text_a: Intraocular pressure in genetically distinct mice : an update and strain survey
label: O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Little is known about genetic factors affecting intraocular pressure ( IOP ) in mice and other mammals .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O

text_a: The purpose of this study was to determine the IOPs of genetically distinct mouse strains , assess the effects of factors such as age , sex and time of day on IOP in specific strain backgrounds , and to assess the effects of specific candidate gene mutations on IOP .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: Based on over 30 studied mouse strains , average IOP ranges from approximately 10 to 20 mmHg .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Gender does not typically affect IOP and aging results in an IOP decrease in some strains .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Most tested strains exhibit a diurnal rhythm with IOP being the highest during the dark period of the day .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Homozygosity for a nan allele of the carbonic anhydrase II gene ( Car2n ) does not alter IOP while homozygosity for a mutation in the leptin receptor gene ( Leprdb ) that causes obesity and diabetes results in increased IOP .
label: O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Albino C57BL / 6J mice homozygous for a tyrosinase mutation ( Tyrc - 2J ) have higher IOPs than their pigmented counterparts .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: Conclusions
label: O

text_a: Genetically distinct mouse strains housed in the same environment have a broad range of IOPs .
label: B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These IOP differences are likely due to interstrain genetic differences that create a powerful resource for studying the regulation of IOP .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Age , time of day , obesity and diabetes have effects on mouse IOP similar to those in humans and other species .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Mutations in two of the assessed candidate genes ( Lepr and Tyr ) result in increased IOP .
label: B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: These studies demonstrate that mice are a practical and powerful experimental system to study the genetics of IOP regulation and disease processes that raise IOP to harmful levels .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Glaucoma is a leading cause of blindness but its molecular etiology is poorly understood .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: Glaucoma involves retinal ganglion cell death and optic nerve damage that is often associated with elevated intraocular pressure ( IOP ) [ 1 - 5 ] .
label: O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is becoming increasingly clear that many forms of glaucoma have a genetic component [ 6 , 7 ] , and much current research is focused on identifying chromosomal regions and genes that contribute to glaucoma [ 8 - 10 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Identifying such loci allows screening for individuals with an increased risk of developing glaucoma [ 11 ] .
label: O O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Identifying genes contributing to elevated IOP and glaucoma is only the first step , however , and animal models will provide systems for subsequent hypothesis testing and experimental dissection of pathogenesis .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Due to conservation in mammalian physiology and the powerful tools of mouse genetics , mice are a very important experimental system for probing the functions ( both in health and disease ) of many genes recently identified by sequencing the human genome [ 12 ] .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O

text_a: We have focused on developing the mouse system for IOP and glaucoma studies [ 13 - 19 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mice are expected to be extremely helpful in characterizing genes and mechanisms that affect IOP or the susceptibility of the optic nerve and retina to glaucomatous damage [ 20 ] .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Very little is known about the magnitude of IOP of various mouse strains or IOP fluctuation in mice with time or other factors .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: Previously , we developed a method to measure IOP in mice and reported initial findings on the magnitude of mouse IOP [ 13 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: The procedure involves direct measurement of pressure following cannulation of the anterior chamber .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The initial experiments demonstrated that in our hands careful ocular cannulation has a very minor effect on IOP ( average of - 0 . 3 mmHg , mode - 0 . 5 mmHg ) and demonstrated significant differences in intraocular pressure levels between four mouse strains .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Here , we provide an update , including an extensive strain survey , and show that the methodology is reliable and produces reproducible data over extended periods of time .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: IOP differences are reproducible and amenable to genetic analyses
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: We report the IOPs of over 30 genetically different mouse strains that were housed in the same environmental conditions .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The magnitude of IOP differences between strains and the good reproducibility of readings over time will allow the use of genetic approaches to identify genes that underlie these differences .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Using our method , a trained investigator can measure the IOPs of 10 mice in an hour .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Thus it is feasible to assess sufficient numbers of mice for quantitative trait locus ( QTL ) analysis methods and to use these methods to identify chromosomal regions contributing to strain differences in IOP .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: The strain survey we report provides valuable information for designing these experiments .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The throughput and reproducibility also is sufficient for mutagenesis screens [ 28 - 30 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: These are important approaches as they may allow the association of genes with IOP and glaucoma whose currently known functions do not suggest that they affect aqueous humor dynamics or do not immediately identify them as likely glaucoma candidates .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: No effect of anesthetic protocol on IOP during a 12 minute measurement window
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Many anesthetic agents including xylazine lower IOP .
label: O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: Ketamine usually appears to increase IOP [ 31 - 33 ] , but there are reports of ketamine having no effect on IOP or even reducing IOP [ 31 , 34 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Different doses , species used , routes of administration or environments may contribute to these differences .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The relationship between the IOPs we measure and those in conscious mice depends upon the effect of our anesthetic protocol ( intraperitoneal injection of 99 mg / kg ketamine and 9 mg / kg xylazine ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: An anesthetic effect could potentially alter IOP and mask genetically determined differences in IOP .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Therefore , it is very important to understand this effect .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Here , we show that , despite a depressant effect on IOP by 25 minutes , our anesthetic protocol has no detectable effect on IOP during the first 12 minutes after administration .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Thus , to avoid effects of anesthesia on IOP , all measurements should be made within a window of up to 12 minutes after anesthetic administration .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: Similarities and differences to rat studies
label: O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Our results agree with the time course of cardiovascular depression caused by intraperitoneal administration of ketamine and xylazine in rats .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: In that study , anesthesia had a minor effect on blood pressure during the first 15 minutes following injection but a strong hypotensive effect between 15 and 30 minutes that continued for more than an hour [ 35 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In contrast , intraperitoneally administered ketamine ( 100 mg / kg ) was shown to rapidly decrease IOP in a different rat study [ 36 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: IOP decreased significantly between a conscious measurement and the first possible measurement under anesthesia ( defined as time 0 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: IOP decreased further by the next reading ( at 5 minutes ) after which it remained stable for the duration of the experiment ( 20 minutes ) [ 36 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The time 0 measurement in that study was at a very similar state of anesthesia as our 4 and 5 minute time points ( starting as soon as possible and within 20 to 60 seconds of adequate anesthesia ) , and the 5 minute rat time point was similar to our 9 and 10 minute measurement times .

text_a: Thus , although both rat and mouse studies show that anesthesia decreases IOP , the studies do not agree on the timing of the effect .

text_a: Two recent papers provide new evidence relevant to the role of the breast cancer susceptibility gene BRCA2 in DNA repair .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-GGP O B-SO O O

text_a: Moynahan et al provide genetic data indicating a requirement for BRCA2 in homology - dependent ( recombinational ) repair of DNA double - strand breaks .

text_a: The second paper , by Davies et al , begins to address the mechanism through which BRCA2 makes its contribution to recombinational repair .

text_a: BRCA2 appears to function in recombination via interactions with the major eukaryotic recombinase RAD51 [ 1 , 2 , 3 ] .

text_a: Following the landmark discovery by Scully et al that the homologous recombinase RAD51 colocalizes at subnuclear sites with BRCA1 [ 9 ] , a number of additional results have provided evidence that both BRCA1 and BRCA2 are involved in recombinational repair of DNA damage .

text_a: Conclusions
label: O

text_a: From these observations we conclude that the blue - shifted ECFP , and the red - shifted EYFP variants of wtGFP are both amenable to use in mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Also since we have established lines of viable and fertile mice having widespread FP expression we have demonstrated that ECFP and EYFP represent developmentally neutral reporters .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Since we were unable to obtain ES cells , embryos or mice with widespread expression of a RFP ( DsRed1 ) we conclude that this reporter is not developmentally neutral or that its expression cannot be sustained at levels high enough for detection , and as such is not as versatile as other gene - based fluorescent reporters .
label: O O O O O O O B-CL O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: ECFP and EYFP can be distinguished on the basis of their unique non - overlapping spectral profiles , and chimeras comprised of ECFP and EYFP tagged compartments demonstrate that the two reporters can be simultaneously non - invasively visualized within the same embryo or adult organ .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Therefore it should be possible to use flow cytometry to isolate cells expressing either or both of the reporters from embryos or adult organs [ 14 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These two reporters can also be used to create pairs of donors and acceptors for in vivo fluorescence energy transfer ( FRET ) [ 15 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Since the emission profiles of ECFP and EYFP are the least overlapping of all the usable GFP variants , these ECFP and EYFP currently represent the best combination for co - visualization and for use in multi - spectral double - tagged transgenic , chimeric and / or in vivo FRET experiments ( reviewed in [ 16 ] ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These experiments have demonstrated the feasibility of monitoring multiple FP reporters non - invasively within a single animal , and have shown the developmental neutrality of the FP reporters employed .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This should pave the way for novel strategies designed to incorporate the use of compound transgenics or tissue recombination or chimeric analyses where several compartments are to be tagged .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This technology should provide new possibilities in manipulating the mouse genome , and non - invasively studying the consequences .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Ears of Brn3c nan mutants develop immature hair cells , identifiable only by certain molecular markers , and undergo apoptosis in neonates .
label: O O B-GGP O B-SO O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: This partial development of hair cells could lead to enough neurotrophin expression to sustain sensory neurons through embryonic development .
label: O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O

text_a: We have therefore investigated in these mutants the patterns of innervation and of expression of known neurotrophins .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO B-GGP O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: At birth there is a limited expression of BDNF and NT - 3 in the mutant sensory epithelia and DiI tracing shows no specific reduction of afferents or efferents that resembles neurotrophin nan mutations .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-SO O

text_a: At postnatal day 7 / 8 ( P7 / 8 ) , innervation is severely reduced both qualitatively and quantitatively .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: 1 % of myosin VIIa - positive immature hair cells are present in the mutant cochlea , concentrated in the base .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Around 20 % of immature hair cells exist in the mutant vestibular sensory epithelia .
label: O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Despite more severe loss of hair cells ( 1 % compared to 20 % ) , the cochlea retains many more sensory neurons ( 46 % compared to 15 % ) than vestibular epithelia .
label: O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Even 6 months old mutant mice have some fibers to all vestibular sensory epithelia and many more to the cochlear apex which lacks MyoVIIa positive hair cells .
label: O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-CL I-CL O

text_a: Topologically organized central cochlea projections exist at least until P8 , suggesting that functional hair cells are not required to establish such projections .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: The limited expression of neurotrophins in the cochlea of Brn3c nan mice suffices to support many sensory neurons , particularly in the cochlea , until birth .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Brn3c is a POU domain factor that is crucial for inner ear hair cell development .
label: B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O

text_a: Targeted nan Brn3c mutants have no mature hair cells [ 1 , 2 ] .
label: O O B-GGP B-SO O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Close examination has revealed that some ' immature ' hair cells form in Brn3c nan mutants and express cellular markers such as Myosin VI and VIIa , calretinin and parvalbumin [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O B-GGP O B-SO O O B-CL O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , these immature hair cells of Brn3c nan mutants undergo apoptosis in neonates [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O B-CL I-CL O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: Consistent with an apparent absence of mature hair cells , initial work suggested that all vestibular and most spiral ganglion cells are lost by postnatal day 14 ( P14 ; [ 1 ] ) .
label: O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , more detailed quantification by others [ 3 ] reported that at P4 about 77 % of vestibular neurons and only 29 % of spiral neurons are lost .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O B-CL O O O

text_a: It was suggested that there is possibly a complete loss in adults [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Other than these preliminary statements , no data exists concerning the detailed pattern of loss of innervation in Brn3c nan mutants .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-SO O

text_a: The initial development and partial differentiation of hair cells in Brn3c mutants could possibly lead to some neurotrophin expression in these cells to sustain sensory neurons through embryonic development and beyond .
label: O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Data on various single and compound neurotrophin nan mutants have shown that the loss of a specific neurotrophin leads to topologically restricted loss of sensory neurons in the embryonic ear [ 4 , 5 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Such selective loss in Brn3c nan mutants would therefore indicate reduction of a specific neurotrophin in immature hair cells .
label: O O O O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-CL I-CL O

text_a: Moreover , recent work shows that in embryos NT - 3 is primarily expressed in supporting cells , moving only around birth into hair cells [ 6 , 7 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: In fact , the selective loss of vestibular as compared to cochlear sensory neurons ( 77 % versus 29 % ; [ 3 ] ) suggests that NT - 3 expression may be less downregulated in Brn3c nan mutants than BDNF [ 6 , 8 , 9 ] , provided that at least some differentiation of supporting cells takes place .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O

text_a: In the ear [ 4 ] as well as elsewhere [ 10 ] neurotrophins are progressively downregulated in postnatal mammals and possibly replaced by other factors [ 11 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We have investigated in detail the pattern of innervation in the Brn3c mutants , as well as the expression of NT - 3 and BDNF .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: We want to evaluate a possible correlation between the topology of sensory neuron loss and absence of a specific neurotrophin or topological loss of hair cells at birth and in older animals .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: This information could be important for an in - depth evaluation of the human deafness related to the Pou4f3 gene , DFNA15 [ 12 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-GGP B-SO O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: We report here long term retention of cochlear sensory neurons for at least 6 months , in particular in the cochlear apex , in Brn3c nan mutant mice .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-SO B-Taxon O

text_a: This retention of afferents and efferents is unrelated to hair cell differentiation as not even immature hair cells can be detected at early postnatal stages with MyoVII immunocytochemistry in this part of the cochlea .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O

text_a: This retention of apical spiral neurons is also largely unrelated to neurotrophins which are known to be reduced in their expression in neonatal rodents [ 4 ] .
label: O O O O O B-CL O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: We will explore five points in this discussion : How the limited expression of neurotrophins relates to the apparent survival of primary neurons until P8 ; how the known absence of apical hair cells and of classical neurotrophins can be related to the presence of large numbers of apical turn spiral neurons ; how absence of differentiated hair cells affects afferent and efferent targeting ; and how these data possibly relate to other mutant animals and to children born with profound hearing loss .

text_a: Immature hair cells and limited expression of neurotrophins rescue afferent projection until P8
label: O B-CL I-CL O O O O B-GGP O O O O O

text_a: The neurotrophins have long been implicated as the mediators for target mediated cell death .
label: O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: In essence , this theory of regulation of neuronal connections via neurotrophic support implies that only limited quantities of neurotrophins are released by the target tissue to support only properly connected sensory neurons by providing only these with a critical amount of neurotrophins [ 21 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: Past experiments , which eliminated one or more neurotrophins entirely , only partially tested the basic assumption of this theory in vivo .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For example , in BDNF heterozygotic animals there is a small decrease in the number of sensory neurons in the ear [ 13 ] but no change in the overall pattern of innervation .
label: O O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Moreover , all of the neurotrophin / neurotrophin receptor nan mutants studied to date eliminate expression in both the peripheral target and the brain simultaneously and achieve their effects in late embryos .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In contrast , Brn3c is barely expressed during embryogenesis in the CNS [ 22 ] thus arguing that the survival of ear primary neurons depends crucially on the periphery .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: We suggest that limited expression of neurotrophins in the immature target leads to retention of primary neurons and their afferent fibers in newborn and early postnatal Brn3c nan mice .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Annexin A7 is a Ca2 + - and phospholipid - binding protein , which was isolated as the agent that mediated aggregation of chromaffin granules and fusion of phospholipid membranes in the presence of Ca2 + .

text_a: The protein belongs to a family of evolutionarily conserved proteins of a bipartite structure with a variable N - terminal and a conserved C - terminal domain .

text_a: At the cellular level annexin A7 can be detected in the cytosol , at the plasma membrane , around the nucleus , at vesicular structures including adrenal chromaffin granules , and at the t - tubule system [ 5 , 6 ] .

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The olfactory receptor gene family is one of the largest in the mammalian genome .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O

text_a: Previous computational analyses have identified approximately 1 , 500 mouse olfactory receptors , but experimental evidence confirming olfactory function is available for very few olfactory receptors .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We therefore screened a mouse olfactory epithelium cDNA library to obtain olfactory receptor expressed sequence tags , providing evidence of olfactory function for many additional olfactory receptors , as well as identifying gene structure and putative promoter regions .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO I-SO O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: We identified more than 1 , 200 odorant receptor cDNAs representing more than 400 genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Using real - time PCR to confirm expression level differences suggested by our screen , we find that transcript levels in the olfactory epithelium can differ between olfactory receptors by up to 300 - fold .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Differences for one gene pair are apparently due to both unequal numbers of expressing cells and unequal transcript levels per expressing cell .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O B-SO O O O B-CL O

text_a: At least two - thirds of olfactory receptors exhibit multiple transcriptional variants , with alternative isoforms of both 5 ' and 3 ' untranslated regions .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O

text_a: Some transcripts ( 5 % ) utilize splice sites within the coding region , contrary to the stereotyped olfactory receptor gene structure .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: Most atypical transcripts encode nonfunctional olfactory receptors , but can occasionally increase receptor diversity .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusions
label: O

text_a: Our cDNA collection confirms olfactory function of over one - third of the intact mouse olfactory receptors .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O

label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The interaction of olfactory ( or odorant ) receptors with their odorant ligands is the first step in a signal transduction pathway that results in the perception of smell .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The olfactory receptor gene family is one of the largest in the mammalian genome , comprising about 1 , 500 members in the mouse genome [ 1 , 2 ] .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Olfactory receptors were originally identified in an elegant experiment based on the hypothesis that they would be seven - transmembrane - domain proteins encoded by a large , diverse gene family whose expression is restricted to the olfactory epithelium [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O B-SO B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Subsequent studies have shown that some of these receptors do indeed respond to odorants and can confer that responsivity when expressed in heterologous cell types ( for example [ 4 ] ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Recent computational investigations have provided the almost complete human [ 5 , 6 ] and mouse [ 1 , 2 ] olfactory receptor - gene catalogs .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: However , the assignment of most of these genes as olfactory receptors is based solely on similarity to one of a relatively small number of experimentally confirmed mouse olfactory receptors or , worse , on similarity to a gene that in turn was defined as an olfactory receptor solely by similarity .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: While similarity - based genome annotation is a good initial method to identify genes and predict their function , in some cases it can be misleading , as genes of similar sequence can carry out different functions and be expressed in different tissues ( for example , the sugar transporter gene family [ 7 ] ) .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: A small subset of olfactory receptors appears to be expressed in non - olfactory tissues , principally the testis [ 8 ] , but also taste tissues [ 9 ] , prostate [ 10 ] , erythroid cells [ 11 ] , notochord [ 12 ] and perhaps other tissues .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Expression in the testis has led some investigators to suggest that a subset of olfactory receptors may function as spermatid chemoreceptors [ 8 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: Recent studies of one human testis - expressed olfactory receptor indicate that it does indeed function in sperm chemotaxis [ 13 ] .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: Due to the paucity of experimental evidence of the olfactory function of most genes in the family and suggestions of extra - olfactory roles , we embarked on an olfactory receptor expressed sequence tag ( EST ) project to confirm olfactory epithelial expression of hundreds of mouse odorant receptor genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-SO O

text_a: Within the olfactory epithelium , individual olfactory receptor genes show an intriguing expression pattern .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Each olfactory receptor is expressed in a subset of cells in one of four zones of the epithelium [ 14 , 15 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , each olfactory neuron expresses only one allele [ 16 ] of a single olfactory receptor gene [ 17 , 18 ] , and the remaining approximately 1 , 499 genes are transcriptionally inactive .
label: O O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: While the mechanism ensuring singular expression is unknown , many hypotheses have been proposed [ 14 , 16 , 19 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In one model , somatic DNA recombination would bring one olfactory receptor gene into a transcriptionally active genomic configuration , as observed for the yeast mating type locus [ 20 ] and the mammalian immunoglobulin genes [ 21 ] .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-SO O O O O O B-Taxon O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Alternatively , a second model invokes a combinatorial code of transcription factor binding sites unique to each gene .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O B-SO O

text_a: This is unlikely , however , as even olfactory receptor transgenes with identical upstream regions are expressed in different neurons [ 18 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: In a third model , there would be a limiting quantity of transcription factors - the cell might contain a single transcriptional ' machine ' that is capable of accommodating the promoter of only one olfactory receptor gene , similar to the expression site body used by African trypanosomes to ensure singular expression of only one set of variant surface glycoprotein genes [ 22 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Finally , in a fourth model , transcriptional activity at one stochastically chosen olfactory receptor allele might send negative feedback to repress activity of all other olfactory receptors and / or positive feedback to enhance its own expression .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the latter three models , some or all olfactory receptor genes might share transcription factor binding motifs , and in the first model , olfactory receptor genes might share a common recombination signal .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO O

text_a: In order to perform computational and experimental searches for such signals , it is important to have a better idea of the transcriptional start site of a large number of olfactory receptor genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Our olfactory receptor EST collection provides 5 ' untranslated region ( UTR ) sequences for many genes and , therefore , a large dataset of candidate promoter regions .
label: O O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O

text_a: Olfactory receptor genes have an intronless coding region , simplifying both computational and experimental olfactory receptor identification .
label: O O B-SO O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For a small number of olfactory receptors , gene structure has been determined .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Additional 5 ' untranslated exons lie upstream of the coding region and can be alternatively spliced [ 19 , 23 - 26 ] .
label: O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The 3 ' untranslated region is typically intronless .
label: O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O

text_a: Exceptions to this stereotyped structure have been described for some human olfactory receptors , but are thought to be rare [ 25 - 27 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: cDNA identification and RACE data have been used to determine gene structure for about 30 genes , see , for example , [ 19 , 23 ] .
label: B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , computational prediction of the location of 5 ' upstream exons and the extent of the 3 ' UTR from genomic sequence has been extremely difficult .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO I-SO O O O O O

text_a: A combination of splice site predictions and similarity to other olfactory receptors has allowed some investigators to predict 5 ' exon locations for around 15 genes [ 25 , 28 ] .
label: O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Experimental validation shows that some , but not all , predictions are accurate [ 24 , 25 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The total number of olfactory receptors for which gene structure is known is vastly increased by our study .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In this report , we describe the isolation and analysis of over 1 , 200 cDNAs representing 419 odorant receptor genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O

text_a: We screened a mouse olfactory epithelium library with degenerate olfactory receptor probes and obtained 5 ' end sequences ( ESTs ) from purified cDNAs .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O B-SO O

text_a: These clones confirm olfactory expression of over 400 olfactory receptors , provide their gene structure , demonstrate that not all olfactory receptors are expressed at the same level and show that most olfactory receptor genes have multiple transcriptional isoforms .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: Molecular cloning and characterization of the mouse Acdp gene family
label: B-CHEBI O O O O O B-Taxon O B-SO O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: We have recently cloned and characterized a novel gene family named ancient conserved domain protein ( ACDP ) in humans .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO B-SO B-CHEBI O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: To facilitate the functional study of this novel gene family , we have cloned and characterized Acdp , the mouse homologue of the human ACDP gene family .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O B-Taxon O B-SO O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: The four Acdp genes ( Acdp1 , Acdp2 , Acdp3 and Acdp4 ) contain 3 , 631 bp , 3 , 244 bp , 2 , 684 bp and 2 , 743 bp of cDNA sequences , and encode deduced proteins of 951 , 874 , 713 and 771 amino acids , respectively .
label: O O O B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O B-SO I-SO O O O B-SO B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O

text_a: The mouse Acdp genes showed very strong homologies ( > 90 % ) in both nucleotide and amino acid sequences to their human counterparts .
label: O B-Taxon O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-Taxon B-SO O

text_a: In addition , both nucleotide and amino acid sequences within the Ancient Conserved Domain ( ACD ) are highly conserved in many different taxonomic species .
label: O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Particularly , Acdp proteins showed very strong AA homologies to the bacteria CorC protein ( 35 % AA identity with 55 % homology ) , which is involved in magnesium and cobalt efflux .
label: O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI B-SO O O B-Taxon B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: The Acdp genes are widely expressed in all tissues tested except for Acdp1 , which is only highly expressed in the brain with low levels of expression in kidney and testis .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Immunostaining of Acdp1 in hippocampus neurons revealed a predominant localization on the plasma membrane .
label: O O B-GGP O O B-CL O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: The Acdp genes are evolutionarily conserved in diverse species and ubiquitously expressed throughout development and adult tissues suggesting that Acdp may be an essential gene .
label: O O B-SO O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Acdp showed strong homology to bacteria CorC protein and predominantly localized on the plasma membrane .
label: O O O B-SO O B-Taxon B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GO I-GO O

text_a: These results suggest that Acdp is probably a family of proteins involved in ion transport in mammalian cells
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O B-Taxon B-CL

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: We have recently cloned and characterized a novel gene family named ancient conserved domain protein ( ACDP ) which encodes four protein members in humans [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO B-SO B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: We found that this gene family is evolutionarily conserved in diverse species ranging from bacteria , yeast , C . elegans , and D . melanogaster to mammals .

text_a: To facilitate the functional analysis of the ACDP gene family , we cloned and characterized Acdp , the mouse homologue of the human ACDP gene family .

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: Although the exact functions of the ACDP gene family are not yet elucidated , several lines of evidence suggest that ACDP genes may play an important role in biological processes .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: First , these genes are evolutionarily conserved in many phylogenetically divergent species ; Second , multiple genes are present in a species ; Third , these genes are ubiquitously expressed throughout development and adult tissues ( unpublished data ) .

text_a: A mouse model of sitosterolemia : absence of Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 results in failure to secrete biliary cholesterol
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Mutations in either of two genes comprising the STSL locus , ATP - binding cassette ( ABC ) - transporters ABCG5 ( encoding sterolin - 1 ) and ABCG8 ( encoding sterolin - 2 ) , result in sitosterolemia , a rare autosomal recessive disorder of sterol trafficking characterized by increased plasma plant sterol levels .
label: B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GGP O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O

text_a: Based upon the genetics of sitosterolemia , ABCG5 / sterolin - 1 and ABCG8 / sterolin - 2 are hypothesized to function as obligate heterodimers .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O

text_a: No phenotypic difference has yet been described in humans with complete defects in either ABCG5 or ABCG8 .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: These proteins , based upon the defects in humans , are responsible for regulating dietary sterol entry and biliary sterol secretion .
label: O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: Methods
label: O

text_a: In order to mimic the human disease , we created , by a targeted disruption , a mouse model of sitosterolemia resulting in Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 deficiency alone .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O

text_a: Homozygous knockout mice are viable and exhibit sitosterolemia .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: Mice deficient in Abcg8 have significantly increased plasma and tissue plant sterol levels ( sitosterol and campesterol ) consistent with sitosterolemia .
label: B-Taxon O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: Interestingly , Abcg5 / sterolin - 1 was expressed in both liver and intestine in Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 deficient mice and continued to show an apical expression .
label: O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: Remarkably , Abcg8 deficient mice had an impaired ability to secrete cholesterol into bile , but still maintained the ability to secrete sitosterol .
label: O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: We also report an intermediate phenotype in the heterozygous Abcg8 + / - mice that are not sitosterolemic , but have a decreased level of biliary sterol secretion relative to wild - type mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-Taxon O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: These data indicate that Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 is necessary for biliary sterol secretion and that loss of Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 has a more profound effect upon biliary cholesterol secretion than sitosterol .
label: O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Since biliary sitosterol secretion is preserved , although not elevated in the sitosterolemic mice , this observation suggests that mechanisms other than by Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 may be responsible for its secretion into bile .
label: O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Absorption of dietary cholesterol from the intestine is an important part of cholesterol homeostasis and represents the initial step that allows dietary cholesterol to exert its metabolic effects .
label: O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: A typical western diet contains relatively equal amounts of cholesterol and non - cholesterol sterols , mainly plant sterols , of which about 55 % of the dietary cholesterol is absorbed and retained compared to ~ 1 % of the dietary non - cholesterol sterols [ 1 - 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: Schoenheimer recognized more than 75 years ago that only cholesterol , not non - cholesterol sterols , is absorbed in the intestine , although the exact molecular mechanisms by which preferential cholesterol absorption occurs has not been fully elucidated [ 4 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Similarly , although the liver secretes free cholesterol into bile , it can preferentially excrete non - cholesterol sterols into bile and the mechanism ( s ) of this process has yet to be elucidated as well .
label: O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Only recently , through the study of a rare human disease , have clues to this process been revealed .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Sitosterolemia ( MIM 210250 , also known as phytosterolemia ) is a rare autosomal , recessively inherited disorder characterized by elevated blood and tissue plant sterol levels [ 5 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: Affected individuals can develop tendon and / or tuberous xanthomas , hemolytic episodes , arthralgias , arthritis , and premature atherosclerosis [ 6 , 7 ] .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Sitosterolemic patients have diagnostically elevated plasma plant sterol levels ( for example , sitosterol , campesterol , stigmasterol , and avenosterol , etc . ) and their 5 - saturated stanol metabolites , particularly sitostanol , with normal or only moderately increased cholesterol levels .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: Clinical studies have shown that affected individuals hyperabsorb all dietary sterols ( thus have lost the ability to restrict the sterol species absorbed ) and have lost the ability to excrete sterols into bile [ 8 , 9 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: Infusion of sitosterol and cholesterol into normal individuals leads to a rapid and preferential excretion of sitosterol into bile , but in sitosterolemic individuals biliary sterol secretion is almost absent [ 7 , 9 ] .
label: O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Previous studies on sitosterolemia have suggested a defect involving a putative sterol ' transporter ' expressed in the intestinal brush border and / or the hepatic canalicular membrane [ 10 , 11 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O B-GO B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Genetic analyses of sitosterolemia pedigrees allowed the mapping of the STSL locus to human chromosome 2p21 , between D2S2294 and D2S2298 [ 12 , 13 ] .
label: B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: By using positional cloning procedures or by screening for genes induced by exposure to LXR agonists , two groups identified not one but two genes , ABCG5 and ABCG8 , which encode the proteins sterolin - 1 and sterolin - 2 , mutations of which cause sitosterolemia [ 14 - 16 ] .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O B-CHEBI B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Interestingly , complete mutation in either ABCG5 alone or ABCG8 alone is not only necessary , but sufficient to cause the disease [ 14 ] .
label: O O O B-SO O O B-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To date , no patient with sitosterolemia has been identified with mutations in both genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O

text_a: Based upon these data , and the similarity of the clinical and biochemical phenotype , sterolin - 1 and sterolin - 2 are hypothesized to function as obligate heterodimers .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O

text_a: This is also supported by the fact that each of these proteins is a ' half - transporter ' , containing six transmembrane domains , and not the classical 12 transmembrane characteristic of functional ABC transporters .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-GO B-SO O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: The exact function of these two proteins still remains unknown but recent studies have shown that overexpression of ABCG5 / ABCG8 in a transgenic mouse model results in an increased biliary cholesterol concentration and a 50 % reduction in the fractional absorption of dietary cholesterol [ 17 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: It has been suggested that ABCG5 and ABCG8 act as mutual chaperones for both maturation and correct apical targeting .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: Co - expression of both was required for apical trafficking in a polarized cell line , as well in vivo using Abcg5 / Abcg8 double - knockout mice [ 18 , 19 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: However , no functional assay has yet been developed to demonstrate whether or not the two half - transporters function as homo - or heterodimers and whether they selectively pump sterols .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Likewise , the cellular localization of these two proteins has yet to be shown in a model deficient in either Abcg5 or Abcg8 alone .
label: O O O B-CL O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O

text_a: A mouse model disrupting both Abcg5 and Abcg8 simultaneously results in a phenotype similar to that of the human disease [ 20 ] .
label: O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: However , it is important to point out that the human disease is caused by complete mutation in one or the other gene , but not both simultaneously .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: We hypothesized that disruption of only one of the half - transporters would result in sitosterolemia and selective loss of either sterolin may show a differential effect on the biliary secretion of sterols or intestinal absorption of sterols .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: These studies are difficult to test in humans , as the target organs are relatively inaccessible .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In order to test this hypothesis , we report a mouse model that has a selective genetic mutation of Abcg8 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-SO B-SO O B-GGP O

text_a: Mice homozygous for Abcg8 loss exhibit many of the characteristics of the human disease sitosterolemia .
label: B-Taxon O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: In addition , we report studies of biliary sterol secretion that show that despite forced secretion , Abcg8 - deficient animals cannot secrete cholesterol into bile , although sitosterol secretion seemed unaffected .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Therefore , at this time , we can neither exclude the possibility that Abcg5 / sterolin - 1 expression is functional in our Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 deficient mice nor can we rule it out .

text_a: In this context , Pl o sch et al . have described an Abcg5 / sterolin - 1 deficient mouse that maintains the ability to secrete biliary cholesterol to the same extent as the wild - type mice and , when fed a LXR agonist , had higher Abcg8 mRNA expression and tended to secrete more biliary cholesterol than wild - type mice [ 46 ] .

text_a: It has been argued that Abcg5 / sterolin - 1 and Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 are dependent upon each other for secretion of hepatic sterols into bile [ 19 ] .

text_a: Taken together , these animal models suggest that Abcg5 / sterolin - 1 and Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 have independent function in vivo or that there are proteins other than the sterolins that can secrete biliary sterols .

text_a: Conclusions
label: O

text_a: The major findings in this study are : ( 1 ) disruption of only one of the two genes comprising the STSL locus is necessary and sufficient to cause sitosterolemia , ( 2 ) that the loss of Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 leads to the loss of biliary cholesterol secretion and ( 3 ) Abcg5 / sterolin - 1 appears to be still apically - expressed despite the absence of Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-GO O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: These data strongly support the direct role of Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 as a key player in biliary cholesterol secretion , although biliary sitosterol secretion was apparently preserved .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: These data suggest that there are mechanisms other than Abcg8 / sterolin - 2 that allow for the secretion of sitosterol into bile .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Pendred syndrome is a relatively common autosomal - recessive disorder characterized by deafness and goiter [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The syndrome is caused by mutations of the PDS gene SLC26A4 , which codes for the protein pendrin [ 2 ] .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO B-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI B-GGP O O O O

text_a: Deafness is congenital and generally profound although sometimes late in onset and provoked by light head injury .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Vestibular dysfunction is uncommon .
label: O O O O O

text_a: Goiter is variable and generally develops around puberty [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The cause of goiter appears to be an impairment of iodide fixation in the follicular lumen due to a reduced rate of iodide transport across the apical membrane of thyroid gland epithelial cells [ 4 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O

text_a: A positive perchlorate discharge test and an enlarged vestibular aqueduct appear to be the most reliable clinical signs of Pendred syndrome [ 5 ] .
label: O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Pendrin is an anion exchanger that can transport Cl - , I - , HCO3 - and formate [ 6 , 7 ] .
label: B-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: Expression has been found in the inner ear and thyroid gland consistent with the clinical signs of deafness and goiter [ 2 , 3 , 8 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In addition , pendrin expression has been found in the kidney [ 9 ] , mammary gland [ 10 ] , uterus [ 11 ] , testes [ 12 ] and placenta [ 13 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: No expression was found in fetal or adult brain , consistent with a peripheral cause of deafness [ 2 , 11 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Expression of pendrin mRNA in the inner ear has been found in several places including the cochlea , the vestibular labyrinth and the endolymphatic sac [ 8 ] .
label: O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The precise location of pendrin protein expression , however , has not yet been determined .
label: O O O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The variability of deafness in Pendred syndrome and the observation that deafness is sometimes late in onset suggest that pendrin dysfunction may not be the direct cause of deafness .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is conceivable that pendrin dysfunction favors changes in the expression levels of proteins that are critical for the maintenance of the hearing function .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Detailed studies aimed at identifying the direct cause of deafness in Pendred syndrome have recently become possible due to the generation of a pendrin - specific polyclonal antibody [ 9 ] and the development of Slc26a4 - / - mice , which bear a targeted disruption of the mouse Slc26a4 gene [ 14 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GO O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O

text_a: The aim in the present study was to determine the location of pendrin and the cause of deafness in Slc26a4 - / - mice .

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Skeletal muscle fibers are generally classified as type I ( oxidative / slow ) or type II ( glycolytic / fast ) fibers .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: They display marked differences in respect to contraction , metabolism , and susceptibility to fatigue .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Type I fibers are mitochondria - rich and mainly use oxidative metabolism for energy production , which provides a stable and long - lasting supply of ATP , and thus are fatigue - resistant .
label: O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: Type II fibers comprise three subtypes , IIa , IIx , and IIb .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Type IIb fibers have the lowest levels of mitochondrial content and oxidative enzymes , rely on glycolytic metabolism as a major energy source , and are susceptible to fatigue , while the oxidative and contraction functions of type IIa and IIx lie between type I and IIb ( Booth and Thomason 1991 ; Berchtold et al . 2000 ; Olson and Williams 2000 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Adult skeletal muscle shows plasticity and can undergo conversion between different fiber types in response to exercise training or modulation of motoneuron activity ( Booth and Thomason 1991 , Jarvis et al . 1996 ; Pette 1998 ; Olson and Williams 2000 ; Hood 2001 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This conversion of muscle fiber from type IIb to type IIa and type I is likely to be mediated by a calcium signaling pathway that involves calcineurin , calmodulin - dependent kinase , and the transcriptional cofactor Peroxisome proliferator - activated receptor - gamma coactivator 1 alpha ( PGC - 1 alpha ) ( Naya et al . 2000 ; Olson and Williams 2000 ; Lin et al . 2002 ; Wu et al . 2002 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , the targeted transcriptional factors directly responsible for reprogramming the fiber - specific contractile and metabolic genes remain to be identified .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Muscle fiber specification appears to be associated with obesity and diabetes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For instance , rodents that gain the most weight on high - fat diets possess fewer type I fibers ( Abou et al . 1992 ) .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In obese patients , skeletal muscle has been observed to have reduced oxidative capacity , increased glycolytic capacity , and a decreased percentage of type I fibers ( Hickey et al . 1995 ; Tanner et al . 2002 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Similar observations have been made in type 2 diabetic patients ( Lillioja et al . 1987 ; Hickey et al . 1995 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Recently , it has been shown that increasing oxidative fibers can lead to improved insulin action and reduced adipocyte size ( Luquet et al . 2003 ; Ryder et al . 2003 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We have previously established that peroxisome proliferator - activated receptor ( PPAR ) delta is a major transcriptional regulator of fat burning in adipose tissue through activation of enzymes associated with long - chain fatty - acid beta - oxidation ( Wang et al . 2003 ) .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although PPAR delta is the predominant PPAR isoform present in skeletal muscle , its in vivo function has not been determined .
label: O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Our current study uncovers PPAR delta as the first transcription factor able to drive the formation of functional type I muscle fibers , whose activation entrains complex pathways both enhancing physical performance and creating a state of obesity resistance .

text_a: This indicates that rapid , systematic , and coordinated changes of muscle fiber properties toward type I can be achieved by activation of the endogenous PPAR delta pathway .

text_a: Muscle Fiber Switch by PPAR delta Protects Against Obesity
label: O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O

text_a: A number of previous studies have shown that obese individuals have fewer oxidative fibers , implying that the presence of oxidative fibers alone may play a part in obesity resistance .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To test this possibility , we fed the transgenic mice and their wild - type littermates with a high - fat diet for 97 d .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although the initial body weights of the two groups were very similar , the transgenic mice had gained less than 50 % at day 47 , and only one - third at day 97 , of the weight gained by the wild - type animals ( Figure 4A ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: The transgenic mice displayed significantly higher oxygen consumption on the high - fat diet than the control littermates ( unpublished data ) .
label: O B-SO B-Taxon O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: By the end of this experiment , the control littermates became obese , whereas the transgenic mice still maintained a normal body weight and fat mass composition ( Figure 4A ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A histological analysis of inguinal fat pad revealed a much smaller cell size in the transgenic mice ( Figure 4B ) , due to the increased muscle oxidative capacity .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: While there was no significant difference in intramuscular glycogen content , the triglyceride content was much less in the transgenic mice ( Figure 4C and 4D ) , which may explain their improved glucose tolerance ( Figure 4E ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: We also placed wild - type C57BJ6 mice on the high - fat diet and treated them with either vehicle or the PPAR delta agonist GW501516 for 2 mo .
label: O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: GW501516 produced a sustained induction of genes for type I muscle fibers ; this , at least in part , resulted in an only 30 % gain in body weight , a dramatically reduced fat mass accumulation , and improved glucose tolerance , compared to the vehicle - treated group ( Figure 5 ) .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Thus , muscle fiber conversion by stimulation with the PPAR delta agonist or the activated transgene has a protective role against obesity .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-CHEBI O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Activation of PPAR delta Enhances Physical Performance
label: O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O

text_a: Muscle oxidative capacity is a crucial factor for determining endurance and fatigue .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Indeed , type I fibers adaptively generated through exercise training are considered to be fatigue resistant .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , whether the type I fibers generated molecularly via PPAR delta expression can contribute to enhanced performance in the absence of previous training is unclear .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In fact , the consequence of genetically induced fiber switch on running capacity has to our knowledge never been evaluated .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We thus compared exercise performance between untrained , body - weight - matched transgenic and wild - type littermates .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O

text_a: Mice were run on oxygen - infused , enclosed treadmills until exhaustion .
label: B-Taxon O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: Strikingly , the running time and distance the transgenic mice were able to sustain were increased by 67 % and 92 % , respectively ( Figure 6A ; also see Videos S1 and S2 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The transgenic mice ran about 1 h longer than the controls , which translates to nearly a kilometer further .
label: O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: No significant differences in muscle mass ( unpublished data ) and daily activity ( total counts of activity per hour : 1618 +/- 209 for transgenic versus 1987 +/- 301 for wild - type , p > 0 . 35 , n = 4 ) were observed between the transgenic and control mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Thus , the remarkable increase in endurance is the physiologic manifestation of muscle fiber transformation .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This suggests that genetically directed muscle fiber switch is physiologically and functionally relevant .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In addition , we looked at what effect the absence of PPAR delta function has on exercise endurance .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: In the treadmill test , the PPAR delta - nan mice could sustain only 38 % of the running time and 34 % of the distance of their age - and weight - matched wild - type counterparts ( Figure 6B ) .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O

text_a: These results further support a role for PPAR delta in enhancement of physical performance .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: Our data reveal that a PPAR delta - mediated transcriptional pathway can regulate muscle fiber specification , enabling the generation of a strain of mice with a long - distance running phenotype .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: We show that targeted expression of an activated form of PPAR delta produces profound and coordinated increases in oxidation enzymes , mitochondrial biogenesis , and production of specialized type I fiber contractile proteins -- the three hallmarks for muscle fiber type switching ( Figure 6C ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: While induction of muscle oxidation enzymes by PPAR delta has been seen both in vivo and in vitro ( Muoio et al . 2002 ; Dressel et al . 2003 ; Luquet et al . 2003 ; Tanaka et al . 2003 ; Wang et al . 2003 ) , its effects shown here on muscle fiber switching are unexpected .
label: O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These progressive changes in oxidative capacity in conjunction with eventual changes in type I muscle fiber lead to a dramatically improved exercise profile and protection against obesity .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This does not solely depend on achieving a directed muscle fiber type switch but also requires all the associated changes in neural innervation , motor neuron function , and peripheral metabolic adaptation to enable a new integrated physiological response .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Accordingly , activation of muscle PPAR delta essentially recapitulates the effects of exercise training even in the absence of training itself .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To our knowledge , this has not been directly described for any other transcriptional factor .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The muscle phenotypes described here are remarkably similar to those of transgenic mice expressing either calcineurin , calmodulin - dependent kinase , or PGC - 1 alpha ( Naya et al . 2000 ; Lin et al . 2002 ; Wu et al . 2002 ) , indicating that PPAR delta could be one of the hypothetical downstream transcription factors of these pathways .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is important to note that , from our ligand and gain - of - function transgenic studies , PPAR delta needs to be activated in order to direct the muscle fiber switch .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Indeed , in a recent report by Luquet et al .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: ( 2003 ) , simple overexpression of wild - type PPAR delta in muscle was found not to be sufficient to promote a fiber switch or obesity resistance , although certain oxidation enzymes were increased .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: This supports the model in Figure 6C that the activating signal or ligand , but not the receptor , is limiting .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Thus , PPAR delta activation , rather than merely an increase of PPAR delta levels , is an essential element for fiber switching and its associated functional manifestations .
label: O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: How might endogenous PPAR delta become activated naturally by exercise training ?
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: First , it is possible that exercise generates or increases endogenous ligands for PPAR delta as tissues are undergoing substantial increases in fatty - acid internalization and burning .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Fatty acids and their metabolites can activate PPAR delta .
label: B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O B-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: A second model is that exercise may induce expression of PGC - 1 alpha ( Goto et al . 2000 ) and thereby activate PPAR delta .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: This is consistent with previous work in which we have shown that PGC - 1 alpha physically associates with PPAR delta in muscle tissue and can powerfully activate it even in the absence of ligands ( Wang et al . 2003 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Alternatively , PPAR delta may be activated by a distal upstream signaling component such as a kinase cascade .
label: O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Further dissecting the interactions between PPAR delta and its regulatory components will be necessary to fully understand the molecular basis of muscle fiber determination pertinent to exercise training .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Skeletal muscle is a major site to regulate whole - body fatty - acid and glucose metabolism .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: We show that mice with increased oxidative fibers are resistant to high - fat - induced obesity and glucose intolerance .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: Moreover , ligand studies provide compelling evidence that activation of endogenous PPAR delta can produce similar effects .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O

text_a: Might PPAR delta have any beneficial effects on glucose metabolism in the lean condition ?
label: O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: This has not been explored ; however , insulin resistance in the elderly is confined mostly to skeletal muscle and may be due to reduction of mitochondrial number and / or function ( Petersen et al . 2003 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The ability of PPAR delta to stimulate mitochondrial biogenesis and oxidative function suggests that PPAR delta could be important for control of insulin resistance during normal aging .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O B-GO O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O

text_a: Together , these data indicate that PPAR delta and its ligands comprise a key molecular switch to regulate muscle fiber specification , obesity resistance , insulin sensitivity , and , most surprisingly , physical endurance .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This work demonstrates that complex physiologic properties such as fatigue , endurance , and running capacity can be genetically manipulated .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: JNCL is a recessively inherited , childhood - onset neurodegenerative disease most - commonly caused by a ~ 1 kb CLN3 mutation .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: The resulting loss of battenin activity leads to deposition of mitochondrial ATP synthase , subunit c and a specific loss of CNS neurons .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-CL I-CL O

text_a: We previously generated Cln3 Delta ex7 / 8 knock - in mice , which replicate the common JNCL mutation , express mutant battenin and display JNCL - like pathology .

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: To elucidate the consequences of the common JNCL mutation in neuronal cells , we used P4 knock - in mouse cerebella to establish conditionally immortalized CbCln3 wild - type , heterozygous , and homozygous neuronal precursor cell lines , which can be differentiated into MAP - 2 and NeuN - positive , neuron - like cells .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O B-CL O

text_a: Homozygous CbCln3 Delta ex7 / 8 precursor cells express low levels of mutant battenin and , when aged at confluency , accumulate ATPase subunit c .
label: O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O B-SO B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: Recessive phenotypes are also observed at sub - confluent growth ; cathepsin D transport and processing are altered , although enzyme activity is not significantly affected , lysosomal size and distribution are altered , and endocytosis is reduced .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In addition , mitochondria are abnormally elongated , cellular ATP levels are decreased , and survival following oxidative stress is reduced .
label: O O O B-GO O O O O B-CL B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusions
label: O

text_a: These findings reveal that battenin is required for intracellular membrane trafficking and mitochondrial function .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GO B-GO O O B-GO O O

text_a: Moreover , these deficiencies are likely to be early events in the JNCL disease process and may particularly impact neuronal survival .
