text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Juvenile neuronal ceroid lipofuscinosis ( JNCL ) , or Batten disease , is a recessively inherited childhood - onset neurodegenerative disorder characterized by progressive blindness , seizures , motor and cognitive decline , and early death [ 1 ] .
label: O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The primary genetic defect ( > 80 % disease chromosomes ) leading to JNCL is a 1 . 02 kb genomic DNA deletion in the CLN3 gene , which eliminates exons 7 and 8 and surrounding intronic DNA , predicting a non - functional protein product [ 2 ] .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: The pathological hallmark of JNCL is autofluorescent ceroid lipofuscin deposits within autolysosomes that are enriched in subunit c of the mitochondrial ATP synthase complex [ 3 - 5 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Remarkably , these deposits are not only found in CNS neurons but are also abundant in non - neuronal cells outside of the nervous system .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O B-CL B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: The relationship of subunit c deposits to the JNCL disease process , and the underlying reason for the neuronal specificity of the disease remain poorly understood .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: The CLN3 - encoded protein ( battenin , also called CLN3 or cln3 p ) is a highly conserved , ubiquitously expressed , multi - pass membrane protein [ 6 ] that localizes to the lysosome and other vesicular compartments [ 7 - 9 ] .
label: O B-GGP O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-GO B-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Battenin function remains to be elucidated , although studies of btn1 , the yeast CLN3 ortholog , have implicated battenin in lysosomal pH homeostasis and amino acid transport [ 10 , 11 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon B-GGP B-SO O O O B-GGP O B-GO O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: To explore JNCL pathogenesis and battenin function , we previously generated a genetically precise JNCL mouse model .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Cln3 Delta ex7 / 8 knock - in mice harbor the ~ 1 kb common JNCL mutation and express a non - truncated mutant battenin isoform that is detectable with antibodies recognizing C - terminal epitopes .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO B-GGP B-SO O O O O B-GO O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-SO O

text_a: Homozygous Cln3 Delta ex7 / 8 knock - in mice exhibit a progressive JNCL - like disease , with perinatal onset of subunit c deposition in many cell types and later onset of neuronal dysfunction and behavioral deficits [ 12 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O B-CL O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: These findings suggest that the major JNCL defect leads to abnormal turnover of mitochondrial subunit c , in a manner that selectively compromises CNS neurons .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O

text_a: Currently , there is no suitable neuronal cell system to investigate the impact of the common JNCL mutation on biological processes .
label: O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Therefore , we have established cerebellar neuronal precursor cell lines from Cln3 Delta ex7 / 8 knock - in mice .
label: O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Homozygous CbCln3 Delta ex7 / 8 cells exhibit pathological hallmarks of the disease , and a survey of membrane organelles revealed membrane trafficking defects and mitochondrial dysfunction in homozygous mutant CbCln3 Delta ex7 / 8 cells .
label: O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O B-GO O O O B-GO O O O B-SO O O O O O B-CL O

text_a: Indeed , CLN3 overexpression in HEK - 293 cells altered lysosomal pH and cathepsin D processing [ 17 ] , and lysosomal pH homeostasis is disrupted in JNCL [ 10 , 15 ] .

text_a: It is noteworthy that cathepsin B and the CLN2 - encoded enzyme , TPPI , are also altered in JNCL [ 18 - 20 ] .

text_a: However , membrane organelle disruptions precede subunit c accumulation in homozygous CbCln3 Delta ex7 / 8 cells , since they are observed without aging at confluency .
label: O O B-GO I-GO O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O

label: O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO B-Taxon

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: In Leber ' s congenital amaurosis ( LCA ) , affected individuals are blind , or nearly so , from birth .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This early onset suggests abnormal development of the neural retina .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mutations in genes that affect the development and / or function of photoreceptor cells have been found to be responsible in some families .
label: B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These examples include mutations in the photoreceptor transcription factor , Crx .
label: O O O B-SO O O B-CL O O O B-GGP O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: A Crx mutant strain of mice was created to serve as a model for LCA and to provide more insight into Crx ' s function .
label: O B-GGP B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: In this study , an ultrastructural analysis of the developing retina in Crx mutant mice was performed .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Outer segment morphogenesis was found to be blocked at the elongation stage , leading to a failure in production of the phototransduction apparatus .
label: B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Further , Crx - / - photoreceptors demonstrated severely abnormal synaptic endings in the outer plexiform layer .
label: O O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O O B-GO B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusions
label: O

text_a: This is the first report of a synaptogenesis defect in an animal model for LCA .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: These data confirm the essential role this gene plays in multiple aspects of photoreceptor development and extend our understanding of the basic pathology of LCA .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Photoreceptor cells play a primary role in vision by capturing light energy and converting it into neural stimuli .
label: B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These sensory neurons are a shared element in all organisms capable of sensing light .
label: O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: In humans , genetic diseases of the eye are common and the primary site of disease is most frequently photoreceptors ( for review see [ 1 - 3 ] ) .
label: O B-Taxon O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Photoreceptors have been well studied , particularly with respect to the biochemistry and physiology of phototransduction .
label: B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Insight into the development of vertebrate photoreceptors , however , has lagged behind our understanding of function .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Only recently have the first molecular mechanisms regulating photoreceptor development been identified ( for review see , [ 2 , 4 ] ) .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Crx ( cone - rod homeobox ) is an otx - family homeobox gene expressed predominantly in photoreceptors , from early in their development through to the adult ages [ 5 - 7 ] .
label: B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Crx gene expression is critically dependent upon Otx2 , another member of the same homeobox family which is expressed in early photoreceptor cells [ 8 ] .
label: B-GGP B-SO O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O

text_a: In rod photoreceptors , Crx appears to work in concert with Nrl , a leucine zipper protein that is also restricted in its expression in the retina to rod photoreceptors [ 9 ] .
label: O B-CL I-CL O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O

text_a: Many photoreceptor - specific genes have putative Crx - binding elements in their regulatory regions [ 10 ] , including rhodopsin [ 11 ] and arrestin [ 12 ] .
label: O B-CL O O B-SO O O B-GGP O B-SO I-SO O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mutations in Crx have been associated with several human diseases that lead to blindness , including cone - rod dystrophy 2 [ 6 , 13 , 14 ] , retinitis pigmentosa [ 14 ] , and LCA [ 14 - 16 ] .
label: B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Based on these data , Crx was hypothesized to play a critical role in the differentiation and maintainance of photoreceptor cells [ 5 , 7 ] .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: LCA is the most severe genetic disease of photoreceptors ( see [ 17 ] , for recent review ) .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Affected infants exhibit a complete or near complete absence of vision from birth .

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: The gene encoding the transcriptional coactivator peroxisome proliferator - activated receptor - gamma coactivator - 1 alpha ( PGC - 1 alpha ) was targeted in mice .
label: O B-SO O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O

label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: However , extensive phenotyping revealed multi - system abnormalities indicative of an abnormal energy metabolic phenotype .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The postnatal growth of heart and slow - twitch skeletal muscle , organs with high mitochondrial energy demands , is blunted in PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: With age , the PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice develop abnormally increased body fat , a phenotype that is more severe in females .
label: O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mitochondrial number and respiratory capacity is diminished in slow - twitch skeletal muscle of PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice , leading to reduced muscle performance and exercise capacity .
label: B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice exhibit a modest diminution in cardiac function related largely to abnormal control of heart rate .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice were unable to maintain core body temperature following exposure to cold , consistent with an altered thermogenic response .
label: O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Following short - term starvation , PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice develop hepatic steatosis due to a combination of reduced mitochondrial respiratory capacity and an increased expression of lipogenic genes .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Surprisingly , PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice were less susceptible to diet - induced insulin resistance than wild - type controls .
label: O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O

text_a: Lastly , vacuolar lesions were detected in the central nervous system of PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice .
label: O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: These results demonstrate that PGC - 1 alpha is necessary for appropriate adaptation to the metabolic and physiologic stressors of postnatal life .

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Mitochondrial functional capacity is dynamically regulated to meet the diverse energy demands imposed on the mammalian organism following birth .
label: B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon I-Taxon O O O

text_a: Postnatal mitochondrial biogenesis involves multiple signaling and transcriptional regulatory pathways that control the coordinate expression of nuclear and mitochondrial genes involved in mitochondrial structure , metabolism , and proliferation [ 1 ] .
label: O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Recent evidence points toward a transcriptional coactivator , peroxisome proliferator - activated receptor - gamma ( PPAR gamma ) coactivator - 1 alpha ( PGC - 1 alpha ) , as an integrator of the molecular regulatory circuitry involved in the transcriptional control of cellular energy metabolism , including mitochondrial function and biogenesis [ 1 , 2 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: PGC - 1 alpha was discovered in a yeast two - hybrid screen for brown adipose - specific factors that interact with the adipogenic nuclear receptor PPAR gamma [ 2 ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O

text_a: Subsequently , two additional PGC - 1 family members were identified , PGC - 1 related coactivator ( PRC ) [ 3 ] and PGC - 1 beta [ 4 , 5 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: PGC - 1 alpha serves as a direct transcriptional coactivator of nuclear and nonnuclear receptor transcription factors involved in cellular energy metabolism [ 6 ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: PGC - 1 alpha is distinct among most coactivators in that it exhibits a tissue - enriched expression pattern and is highly inducible by physiologic conditions known to increase the demand for mitochondrial ATP or heat production [ 2 , 6 , 7 ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: PGC - 1 alpha is enriched in brown adipose tissue ( BAT ) , heart , slow - twitch skeletal muscle , and kidney -- all tissues with high - capacity mitochondrial systems .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: The expression of the gene encoding PGC - 1 alpha is rapidly induced by cold exposure , short - term exercise , and fasting [ 2 , 8 , 9 , 10 , 11 , 12 , 13 , 14 , 15 ] .
label: O O O O B-SO O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These latter observations suggest that PGC - 1 alpha is involved in the physiologic control of energy metabolism .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Several lines of evidence , based on the results of overexpression studies , indicate that PGC - 1 alpha is sufficient to promote mitochondrial biogenesis and regulate mitochondrial respiratory capacity .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-GO O O O B-GO O O O

text_a: First , PGC - 1 alpha activates the transcription of mitochondrial uncoupling protein - 1 ( UCP - 1 ) in BAT through interactions with the nuclear hormone receptors PPAR gamma and thyroid receptor [ 2 ] .
label: O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-GO B-CHEBI O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: Second , forced expression studies in adipogenic and myogenic mammalian cell lines demonstrated that PGC - 1 alpha activates mitochondrial biogenesis through a group of transcription factor targets including nuclear respiratory factors 1 and 2 ( NRF - 1 and - 2 ) and mitochondrial transcription factor A ( Tfam ) , key transcriptional regulators of mitochondrial DNA transcription and replication [ 8 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-CL O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GO B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Third , studies in primary cardiac myocytes in culture and in the hearts of transgenic mice have demonstrated that overexpression of PGC - 1 alpha promotes mitochondrial biogenesis [ 10 , 16 ] .
label: O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GO O O O O O O O

text_a: Lastly , forced expression of PGC - 1 alpha in skeletal muscle of transgenic mice triggers mitochondrial proliferation and the formation of mitochondrial - rich type I , oxidative ( slow - twitch ) muscle fibers [ 17 ] .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O B-GO O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Collectively , these results indicate that PGC - 1 alpha is sufficient to drive mitochondrial biogenesis .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: Recent evidence also implicates PGC - 1 alpha in the homeostatic control of systemic energy metabolism .
label: O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: PGC - 1 alpha has been shown to regulate several key hepatic gluconeogenic genes [ 18 , 19 , 20 , 21 ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Recent studies have also shown altered expression of PGC - 1 alpha and downstream mitochondrial target pathways in skeletal muscle of humans with insulin resistance and diabetes [ 22 , 23 , 24 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GO O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In addition , single nucleotide polymorphisms within the human PGC - 1 alpha gene have been shown to be associated with obesity , hypertension , and diabetes [ 25 , 26 , 27 , 28 , 29 , 30 ] .
label: O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The gain - of - function studies described to date provide compelling evidence that PGC - 1 alpha is capable of regulating postnatal energy metabolism .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , the necessity of PGC - 1 alpha for energy metabolic homeostasis , mitochondrial biogenesis , development , and growth can only be addressed using loss - of - function strategies .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To this end , we have established and characterized mice with targeted deletion of the PGC - 1 alpha gene .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O

text_a: Our studies of PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice demonstrate that PGC - 1 alpha is not absolutely required for prenatal viability including mitochondrial biogenesis .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: However , our findings indicate that the coactivator PGC - 1 alpha serves a critical role in the normal metabolic function of multiple organs and for appropriate adaptation to physiologic stress during postnatal life .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Previous studies using gain - of - function strategies have shown that the coactivator PGC - 1 alpha is capable of coactivating an array of transcription factors involved in energy metabolic processes including fatty acid oxidation , electron transport , and oxidative phosphorylation [ 6 ] .

text_a: However , gain - of - function strategies cannot determine whether PGC - 1 alpha is essential for critical energy metabolic processes including mitochondrial biogenesis and function .

text_a: Using targeted gene deletion in mice , we show here that PGC - 1 alpha is not essential for normal embryologic development or the fundamental events of mitochondrial biogenesis .

text_a: However , several lines of evidence support the conclusion that PGC - 1 alpha is necessary for the programs that regulate postnatal mitochondrial function and cellular energy metabolism , processes that equip the organism for the energy metabolic rigors of the postnatal environment .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-CL O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: First , mitochondrial volume density is diminished in slow - twitch skeletal muscle of PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice .
label: O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O

label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Finally , PGC - 1 alpha - / - mice do not respond normally to a variety of physiologic and dietary stresses known to increase oxidative energy demands .

text_a: Nuclear localization of Annexin A7 during murine brain development
label: B-GO O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Annexin A7 is a member of the annexin protein family , which is characterized by its ability to interact with phospholipids in the presence of Ca2 + - ions and which is thought to function in Ca2 + - homeostasis .
label: B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O

text_a: Results from mutant mice showed altered Ca2 + - wave propagation in astrocytes .
label: O O B-SO B-Taxon O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O B-CL O

text_a: As the appearance and distribution of Annexin A7 during brain development has not been investigated so far , we focused on the distribution of Annexin A7 protein during mouse embryogenesis in the developing central nervous system and in the adult mouse brain .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-CHEBI O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: Annexin A7 is expressed in cells of the developing brain where a change in its subcellular localization from cytoplasm to nucleus was observed .
label: B-GGP I-GGP O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O B-GO O O O

text_a: In the adult CNS , the subcellular distribution of Annexin A7 depends on the cell type .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O B-CL O O

text_a: By immunohistochemistry analysis Annexin A7 was detected in the cytosol of undifferentiated cells at embryonic days E5 - E8 .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-GO O O B-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: At E11 - E15 the protein is still present in the cytosol of cells predominantly located in the ventricular germinative zone surrounding the lateral ventricle .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GO O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Later on , at embryonic day E16 , Annexin A7 in cells of the intermediate and marginal zone of the neopallium translocates to the nucleus .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O

text_a: Neuronal cells of all areas in the adult brain present Annexin A7 in the nucleus , whereas glial fibrillary acidic protein ( GFAP ) - positive astrocytes exhibit both , a cytoplasmic and nuclear staining .
label: B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O B-GO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O O O B-GO O B-GO O O

text_a: The presence of nuclear Annexin A7 was confirmed by extraction of the nucleoplasm from isolated nuclei obtained from neuronal and astroglial cell lines .
label: O O O B-GO B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GO O O B-GO O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: We have demonstrated a translocation of Annexin A7 to nuclei of cells in early murine brain development and the presence of Annexin A7 in nuclei of neuronal cells in the adult animal .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GO O B-CL O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GO O B-CL I-CL O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: The role of Annexin A7 in nuclei of differentiating and mature neuronal cells remains elusive .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GO O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Annexins form a family of structurally related proteins , which bind to negatively charged phospholipids in a Ca2 + - dependent manner [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: They are characterized by a bipartite structure with a conserved C - terminal core domain and a unique N - terminal domain that varies in length and amino acid composition .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O

text_a: The C - terminal domain is formed by either a four - or eightfold repeat of approximately 70 amino acids , each repeat carrying a Ca2 + - binding site , and is responsible for phospholipid binding .
label: O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-SO I-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: The N - terminal regions are thought to confer functional diversity to the annexin proteins [ 2 ] .
label: O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: The biochemical features in vitro were analyzed extensively , but the in vivo functions of annexins remain unclear .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Annexin A7 , the first annexin to be described , was isolated as the agent that mediated aggregation of chromaffin granules and fusion of membranes and phospholipids in the presence of Ca2 + - ions [ 3 ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O B-GO O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Expression studies demonstrated the distribution of Annexin A7 in a wide variety of tissues and cells mainly enriched in the cytosol in close association with membranous structures , but it was also described in the nucleus of adrenal chromaffin cells [ 4 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O B-GO O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-CL I-CL O O O O

text_a: The presence of an alternatively spliced cassette exon gives rise to two Annexin A7 isoforms corresponding in molecular mass to 47 kDa and 51 kDa .
label: O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: The isoforms differ in their N - terminal domain and exhibit a tissue - specific expression pattern .
label: O B-SO O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The 47 kDa isoform is present in all tissues except for skeletal muscle , where the 51 kDa isoform is exclusively present .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Heart muscle , brain tissue and red blood cells contain both isoforms [ 5 - 8 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Previous studies indicated that the subcellular localization of Annexin A7 changes during myoblast differentiation .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O B-CL O O

text_a: In undifferentiated cells the protein is equally distributed between cytosol and membrane fractions while in differentiated cells it is exclusively present in the membrane fraction [ 7 ] .
label: O O B-CL O B-CHEBI O O O O B-GO O B-GO I-GO O O O B-CL O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O

text_a: Reports by Clemen et al .
label: O O O O O O

text_a: [ 9 ] and Herr et al .
label: O O O O O O O O

text_a: [ 8 , 10 ] demonstrated roles for Annexin A7 in shape and osmotic resistance of red blood cells , platelet aggregation velocity , and in the velocity of spreading astrocytic Ca2 + - waves .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O B-CL O O O O O O O O O B-CL B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O

text_a: Annexin A7 is also involved in the maintenance of regular cardiac electrophysiology and Ca2 + - homeostasis [ Schrickel et al . , submitted ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Detailed reports on appearance and distribution of Annexin A7 during brain development are not available .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: In the present study we focus on the distribution of Annexin A7 in the developing brain of mice embryos between E5 and E16 , and in the adult mouse brain .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: A Developmental Switch in the Response of DRG Neurons to ETS Transcription Factor Signaling
label: O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Two ETS transcription factors of the Pea3 subfamily are induced in subpopulations of dorsal root ganglion ( DRG ) sensory and spinal motor neurons by target - derived factors .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Their expression controls late aspects of neuronal differentiation such as target invasion and branching .
label: O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: Here , we show that the late onset of ETS gene expression is an essential requirement for normal sensory neuron differentiation .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O

text_a: We provide genetic evidence in the mouse that precocious ETS expression in DRG sensory neurons perturbs axonal projections , the acquisition of terminal differentiation markers , and their dependence on neurotrophic support .
label: O O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Together , our findings indicate that DRG sensory neurons exhibit a temporal developmental switch that can be revealed by distinct responses to ETS transcription factor signaling at sequential steps of neuronal maturation .
label: O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Neuronal differentiation is a protracted process during which newly generated neurons express distinct cellular and molecular programs at precise times during their maturation : long - distance axon outgrowth , subsequent terminal branching , and finally synaptogenesis .
label: B-CL O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O B-CL O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Many important aspects of neuronal character appear to be acquired through the expression of transcription factors at progenitor cell stages , whereas others depend on expression immediately upon cell cycle exit [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: But whether the orderly expression and activity of transcriptional programs at much later developmental stages , well after cell cycle exit , is an essential step in the progression of neuronal differentiation and circuit assembly has yet to be resolved .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The differentiation of sensory neurons of dorsal root ganglia ( DRG ) has been studied extensively with respect to inductive events that specify neuronal fate [ 2 , 3 ] , as well as the involvement of late target - derived neurotrophic factors in the control of neuronal survival [ 4 ] .
label: O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: Recent evidence has begun to emerge that target - derived factors are also involved in regulating later aspects of neuronal differentiation [ 5 , 6 , 7 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In particular , genetic experiments have addressed the survival - independent role of neurotrophic factors during development by exploiting strains of mice defective both in neurotrophin signaling and in the function of the proapoptotic gene Bax [ 8 , 9 ] .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-SO B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: These studies , for example , have revealed that neurotrophin signaling controls the acquisition of peptidergic traits in nociceptive DRG neurons and the control of target innervation [ 8 , 9 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The onset of some transcriptional programs in neurons , however , has also been shown to occur long after neurons exit the cell cycle .
label: O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O B-CL O O

text_a: An emerging principle from work in Drosophila and vertebrates is that target - derived factors play a crucial role in the induction of these transcriptional programs [ 10 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In Drosophila , retrograde BMP signals from the target region control the terminal differentiation of a subpopulation of peptidergic neurons expressing Apterous and Squeeze [ 11 , 12 ] .
label: O B-Taxon O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: In vertebrates , peripheral neurotrophic signals have been shown to direct the onset of expression of the ETS transcription factors Er81 and Pea3 in DRG sensory neurons and motor neuron pools several days after these neurons have become post - mitotic [ 9 , 13 , 14 , 15 , 16 ] .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-CL I-CL O B-CL I-CL O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Moreover , the induction of Er81 expression in proprioceptive afferents is known to be mediated by peripheral neurotrophin 3 ( NT - 3 ) [ 9 ] .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O

text_a: These two ETS proteins control late aspects of spinal monosynaptic circuit assembly , with Er81 directing proprioceptive sensory neuron differentiation and Pea3 directing motor neuron pool differentiation , respectively [ 14 , 15 ] .
label: O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-CL I-CL O O B-GGP O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In particular , in the absence of Er81 , achieved by mutation in the gene or by deprivation of peripheral neurotrophin signaling , group Ia proprioceptive afferents fail to invade the ventral spinal cord and to make effective synaptic connections with motor neurons [ 9 , 14 ] .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: The involvement of target - derived signals in induction of ETS transcription factor expression raises the question of the necessity for the observed delay in the onset of ETS signaling for neuronal maturation .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: Would precocious expression of ETS proteins in post - mitotic neurons also direct the appropriate sensory neuron developmental programs ?
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CL O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O

text_a: In this study , we have used mouse genetics to test this general idea , by investigating whether the precise timing of onset of ETS transcription factor signaling is essential for normal sensory neuron development .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O

text_a: We have assessed the biological effects of inducing ETS signaling either at the correct developmental time , or precociously .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We find that within proprioceptive sensory neurons , the late onset of ETS signaling is essential for the establishment of normal sensory afferent projections in the spinal cord .
label: O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O

text_a: Precocious initiation of ETS signaling in post - mitotic DRG neurons leads to abnormal DRG neuron differentiation characterized by neurotrophin - independent neurite outgrowth and inappropriate profiles of gene expression .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O B-CL O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: Our findings reveal that target - triggered inductive signals provide an effective means of ensuring the late onset of expression of transcription factors , and thus an orderly temporal transcriptional sequence that is crucial for neuronal maturation and circuit assembly .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: To test the hypothesis that a temporal delay in the onset of transcriptional programs is crucial for the control of appropriate neuronal maturation , we studied the development of proprioceptive DRG neurons , since transcriptional effectors regulated by target - derived signals , as well as some of their downstream biological actions , have been identified for these neurons .

text_a: Er81 controls proprioceptive afferent connectivity [ 14 ] , and we therefore sought to identify an ETS transcriptional regulator that , when expressed over the normal time course of Er81 expression , is able to substitute for Er81 function within group Ia afferent sensory neurons .

text_a: EWS - Pea3 Can Replace Er81 Function in Controlling Ia Afferent Projections

text_a: We first defined an ETS transcription regulator that is able to replace the function of Er81 within proprioceptive afferents to direct projections into the ventral spinal cord .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Er81 , Pea3 , and Erm constitute the Pea3 subfamily of ETS transcription factors , show a high degree of amino acid identity , and bind to very similar DNA target sequences [ 17 , 18 , 19 ] .

text_a: Nevertheless , when introduced into the Er81 locus in analogy to a previously used targeting strategy ( data not shown ; [ 14 ] ) , neither Pea3 nor Erm could rescue Ia proprioceptive afferent projections to extensively invade the ventral horn of the spinal cord ( data not shown ) .

text_a: We found that in a luciferase - enzyme - based cell culture transfection assay , EWS - Pea3 showed stronger transactivation activity than Er81 or Pea3 ( Figure 1J ; data not shown ) , in agreement with previous studies [ 22 , 23 , 24 ] .

text_a: Moreover , transactivation by EWS - Pea3 was abolished by mutation of ETS - binding sites in the reporter plasmid , demonstrating ETS - binding - site dependence ( data not shown ) .
label: O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O B-SO I-SO O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Expression of Er81 in DRG neurons of embryos containing integration of EWS - Pea3 in the Er81 locus ( Er81EWS - Pea3 / - ) was abolished ( Figure 1E ) , and the expression level of the calcium - binding protein Parvalbumin ( PV ) in proprioceptive afferents , which is decreased approximately 5 - to 10 - fold in Er81 mutants [ 14 ] , was comparable to wild - type levels in Er81EWS - Pea3 / - embryos ( Figure 1F - 1H ) .

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: ADAM22 is a member of the ADAM gene family , but the fact that it is expressed only in the nervous systems makes it unique .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: ADAM22 ' s sequence similarity to other ADAMs suggests it to be an integrin binder and thus to have a role in cell - cell or cell - matrix interactions .
label: B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O B-CL O B-GO O O

text_a: To elucidate the physiological functions of ADAM22 , we employed gene targeting to generate ADAM22 knockout mice .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: ADAM22 - deficient mice were produced in a good accordance with the Mendelian ratio and appeared normal at birth .
label: B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: After one week , severe ataxia was observed , and all homozygotes died before weaning , probably due to convulsions .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: No major histological abnormalities were detected in the cerebral cortex or cerebellum of the homozygous mutants ; however , marked hypomyelination of the peripheral nerves was observed .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: The results of our study demonstrate that ADAM22 is closely involved in the correct functioning of the nervous system .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Further analysis of ADAM22 will provide clues to understanding the mechanisms of human diseases such as epileptic seizures and peripheral neuropathy .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: ADAM ( A Disintegrin And Metalloprotease ) is a family of membrane - spanning multi - domain proteins containing a metalloproteinase - like domain and a disintegrin - like domain .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O B-SO B-CHEBI O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Currently , more than 30 ADAMs have been identified in mammals .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Their biological activities implicate ADAMs in fertilization , myogenesis and neurogenesis by proteolysis and adhesion .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Some types of ADAM are catalytically active metalloproteases and shed the extracellular domains of membrane - bound growth factors or receptors [ 1 , 2 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO B-SO O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For example , ADAM17 ( TACE ) has been shown to cleave several substrates , including tumour necrosis factor alpha [ 3 , 4 ] , heparin - binding epidermal growth factor - like growth factor [ 6 , 7 ] and transforming growth factor alpha [ 8 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O

text_a: Studies of ADAM17 - nan mice have revealed that ADAM17 is critical in embryogenesis and plays an essential role in the supply of growth factors [ 6 , 8 ] .
label: O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: ADAMs are also involved in cell - cell or cell - matrix adhesion through their interaction with integrins or syndecans .
label: O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O B-CL O B-GO O O O O O B-GO O O O

text_a: More than 10 ADAMs have been shown to support integrin - mediated cell adhesion in vitro [ 9 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: It has been reported that ADAM2 - nan and ADAM3 - nan male mutants are infertile and their spermatozoa lack egg - binding abilities [ 10 - 12 ] .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O B-CL O B-CL O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Both ADAM2 and ADAM3 are not metalloproteases because they lack catalytic site sequences in their metalloprotease domain .
label: O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O

text_a: These studies clearly showed that non - proteinase members of ADAMs also have significant roles in vivo .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We have reported the findings of ADAM11 , ADAM22 and ADAM23 genes and their restricted expression in the human and murine nervous systems [ 13 - 15 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: Sequence analysis suggests that they are not metalloproteases , since they all lack a catalytic motif .
label: B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It has been reported that ADAM23 protein is localised to the cell surface [ 16 ] , interacts with alpha - v beta - 3 integrin heterodimer [ 17 ] and the disruption of ADAM23 gene in the mouse results in premature death associated with ataxia and tremor [ 18 ] .

text_a: Although the cause of death in this mouse is unknown , for these phenotypes , impaired cell - cell or cell - matrix interactions in the nervous system caused by loss of ADAM23 may be responsible .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O B-CL O B-GO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: ADAM22 and ADAM23 share highly homologous sequences in their extracellular domains .
label: B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-SO I-SO O O B-GO B-SO O

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: In the present study , we examined the function of ADAM22 by generating mice that lacked the Adam22 gene .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: ADAM22 - deficient mice exhibited severe ataxia and premature death .
label: B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: In contrast , heterozygous mutants were healthy , fertile and survived more than 1 year without obvious abnormalities .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The cause of death in the homozygous mutants is not clear ; however , it is likely to be due to multiple seizures .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This is because convulsive seizures were occasionally observed in homozygotes , after which the suffered mice appeared exhausted and , in most cases , died on the next day .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is known that cortical dysplasia resulting from aberrant brain development causes seizure syndrome [ 22 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For example , mice lacking the neuron - specific activator of cyclin 5 , p35 , exhibit seizures and a severe neuronal migration defect [ 23 ] .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Because ADAM22 protein is expressed on the cell surface and is likely to be involved in cell - cell or cell - matrix interactions , we hypothesized that depletion of ADAM22 would generate aberrant neuronal migration .
label: O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O B-CL O B-GO O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O

text_a: Histochemical analysis was performed to verify this hypothesis .
label: O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , no marked abnormalities were observed in the mutant mouse brain , ruling out a critical role for ADAM22 in neuronal migration .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-CL O O

text_a: Another possible explanation is that the premature death in first 2 weeks of life is caused by the dysfunction of the autonomic nervous system .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Especially , nerves which control the breathing would be very important , because the respiration system undergoes significant maturation in the first 2 - 3 weeks after birth .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For example , the myelin - deficient ( MD ) rat , which carries a point mutation in the proteolipid protein ( PLP ) gene , exhibits ataxia , tremor , dysmyelination and dies at approximately postnatal day 21 .
label: O O O O B-GO O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO I-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In MD rat , early death is caused by the dysfunction of the brain stem which is essential for autonomic control of respiration during hypoxia [ 24 ] .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Further study is needed to verify the cause of death in ADAM22 - deficient mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Another interesting phenotype observed in ADAM22 - deficient mice was hypomyelinogenesis .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Histopathological analysis revealed marked hypomyelination in the sciatic and trigeminal nerves .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , myelin formation in the spinal cord and the brain was normal .
label: O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It was therefore evident that hypomyelinogenesis occurred specifically in the peripheral nerves in the knockout mice , suggesting Schwann cell dysfunction .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-CL I-CL O O

text_a: In the mutant sciatic nerve , the density of pro - myelinating Schwann cells ( S100 - positive , MBP - negative ) was markedly higher than that seen in heterozygotes .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Higher pro - myelinating Schwann cell density and marked delay in myelin formation indicate that ADAM22 plays an important role in Schwann cell differentiation , but not in proliferation .
label: O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O B-GO O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: Investigations on why hypomyelinogenesis occurred in ADAM22 - deficient mice centre on integrin .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O B-GO O

text_a: This is because several ADAMs have been shown to interact with integrins via disintegrin domains [ 9 ] , and it has been suggested that alpha - 6 beta - 1 integrin on the Schwann cell plays an important role in myelin formation [ 25 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O B-GO O O O O O

text_a: In addition , laminin - 2 is a key player in peripheral myelin formation , because laminin - 2 deficiency causes dysmyelination in mice and humans , and its receptors , alpha - 6 beta - 1 integrin and dystroglycan , are also shown to be deeply involved in myelin formation [ 26 , 27 ] .
label: O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O O O B-GO O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O

text_a: The conditional knockout studies of beta - 1 integrin and laminin gamma - 1 in Schwann cell suggested that both laminin - 2 and integrins are essential for segregation of large bundles of axons in the early stage of myelin formation [ 25 , 28 ] .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-CL I-CL O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO O B-GO O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O

text_a: In contrast , the phenotype seen in the ADAM22 - deficient mice was quite different : for example , unsorted bundles of axons were not seen in nerves and roots .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O

text_a: We assume that ADAM22 partially modulates integrin - mediated signals or is involved at a later stage of myelin formation .
label: O O O B-GGP O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: In summary , we generated ADAM22 - deficient mice and proved that ADAM22 plays an essential role in both the CNS and the PNS .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The results of this study suggest that ADAM22 is involved in human diseases such as epilepsy and peripheral neuropathy .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: The human ADAM22 gene is relatively large , at 300 kb in length , and is comprised of more than 30 exons .
label: O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: It is assigned on 7q21 , where several chromosomal aberrations that are accompanied by neurological disorders have been identified [ 29 , 30 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Further detailed molecular function analysis of ADAM22 may lead to progress in uncovering the mechanisms that underlie certain human neurological diseases .

text_a: Potential genetic modifiers of the cystic fibrosis intestinal inflammatory phenotype on mouse chromosomes 1 , 9 , and 10
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Although cystic fibrosis is caused by mutations in the cystic fibrosis transmembrane conductance regulator ( CFTR ) gene , the severity of disease is highly variable indicating the influence of modifier genes .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: The intestines of Cftr deficient mice ( CF mice : Cftrtm1Unc ) are prone to obstruction by excessive mucus accumulation and are used as a model of meconium ileus and distal intestinal obstruction syndrome .
label: O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This phenotype is strongly dependent on the genetic background of the mice .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: On the C57Bl / 6 background , the majority of CF mice cannot survive on solid mouse chow , have inflammation of the small intestine , and are about 30 % smaller than wild type littermates .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O

text_a: In this work potential modifier loci of the CF intestinal phenotype were identified .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: CF mice on a mixed genetic background ( 95 % C57Bl / 6 and 5 % 129Sv ) were compared to CF mice congenic on the C57Bl / 6 background for several parameters of the intestinal CF phenotype .
label: O B-Taxon O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: CF mice on the mixed background exhibit significantly greater survival when fed dry mouse chow , have reduced intestinal inflammation as measured by quantitative RT - PCR for marker genes , have near normal body weight gain , and have reduced mucus accumulation in the intestinal crypts .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: There was an indication of a gender effect for body weight gain : males did not show a significant improvement at 4 weeks of age , but were of normal weight at 8 weeks , while females showed improvement at both 4 and 8 weeks .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: By a preliminary genome - wide PCR allele scanning , three regions were found to be potentially associated with the milder phenotype .
label: O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: One on chr . 1 , defined by marker D1Mit36 , one on chr .
label: O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO

text_a: 9 defined by marker D9Mit90 , and one on chr .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO

text_a: 10 , defined by marker D10Mit14 .
label: O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: Potential modifier regions were found that have a positive impact on the inflammatory phenotype of the CF mouse small intestine and animal survival .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Identification of polymorphisms in specific genes in these regions should provide important new information about genetic modifiers of the CF intestinal phenotype .
label: O O B-SO O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Cystic fibrosis ( CF ) is caused by mutations in the cystic fibrosis transmembrane conductance regulator ( CFTR ) gene [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Different mutations have a range of effects on the levels of CFTR protein and its proper functioning in epithelial transport of Cl - and HCO3 - [ 2 , 3 ] .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: The severity of the pancreatic phenotype in human CF is well correlated with the extent of impaired CFTR function caused by specific mutations .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Loss of CFTR function results in destruction of the exocrine tissue and eventual pancreatic insufficiency .
label: O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: On the other hand , the effects of CF on organs including the airways and intestines is less well correlated with specific CFTR mutations and their effects on CFTR protein function [ 4 - 8 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: This indicates that other genes are likely to be important as modifiers of the CF phenotype .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: With the exception of pancreatic insufficiency resulting in impaired digestion , other aspects of CF are less readily related to loss of CFTR function .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O

text_a: Nutritional problems can persist even with adequate oral enzyme supplementation [ 9 ] and neutralization of gastric acid to improve lipase function [ 10 ] , and may involve both impaired digestion and absorption of nutrients [ 11 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Inadequate absorption or assimilation of nutrients appears to be of greater importance because even with adequate oral enzyme supplementation nutrition is rarely fully corrected [ 11 ] .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: There is also excessive mucus accumulation in the CF intestine , and inappropriate inflammation is common [ 12 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mucus is involved in obstruction of the gut which occurs frequently in CF infants ( called meconium ileus , MI ) and adults ( called distal intestinal obstruction syndrome , DIOS ) [ 11 , 13 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: And , similar to CF airways , there is also an inflammation of the CF intestines [ 14 , 15 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These changes are less directly related to specific mutations in the CFTR gene and are likely related to other differences in individual genetic makeup .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: Previous work using human patients and genetically altered mice has identified some modifier genes and have advanced our understanding of CF pathophysiology [ 4 ] .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O B-SO B-SO B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In one study using CF mice on different genetic backgrounds , a region on mouse chromosome 7 was shown to ameliorate intestinal blockage and the effect was in part due to a calcium - regulated Cl - channel which compensated for loss of CFTR function [ 16 , 17 ] .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-SO O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: Marker haplotypes of the syntenic region of human chromosome 19q13 were also shown to be associated with the risk of MI in CF patients [ 18 ] .
label: O B-SO O O B-SO B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In other work , a region on mouse chr .
label: O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO

text_a: 6 was strongly associated with lung inflammation , consisting of mononuclear cell interstitial infiltration and fibrosis in CF mouse airways ; and other loci on chr .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO

text_a: 1 , 2 , 10 , and 17 were also linked to the airway phenotype [ 19 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In this work , CF mice on a mixed strain background were found to have a less severe CF phenotype compared to CF mice congenic on the C57Bl / 6 background .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: There were no differences in the pancreatic phenotype comparing CF mice on the different backgrounds [ 20 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , mice on the mixed background seemed more robust than CF mice on the B6 background which prompted us to characterize them in greater detail .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Genome wide allele scanning was used to begin identification of regions associated with the less severe intestinal phenotype .
label: B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: Future identification of specific genes should further our understanding of the complex intestinal CF phenotype .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To determine whether the mixed genetic background affected expression of inflammatory marker genes , quantitative , real - time RT - PCR was used to measure gene expression .

text_a: Expression of the following genes was compared in wild type and CF mice on the different genetic backgrounds .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO I-SO O O B-Taxon O O O B-SO O O

text_a: Mast cell protease 2 ( Mcpt2 ) is a marker of differentiated mast cells [ 22 ] and mast cells are more abundant in the B6 CF mouse intestine .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Leucine - rich alpha 2 glycoprotein ( Lrg1 , [ 23 ] ) is a marker of differentiating neutrophils , which are more numerous in the B6 CF mouse intestine .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: The same gene is also known as leucine - rich high endothelial cell glycoprotein ( Lrhg ) and has been shown to be a marker of high endothelial venules ( HEV ) [ 24 ] which increase in tissues during inflammation [ 25 , 26 ] .
label: O O B-SO O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Hematopoietic cell transcript 1 ( HemT1 , [ 27 ] ) is a marker of blood cell proliferation and its expression is strongly elevated in the B6 CF mouse small intestine .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Serum amyloid A3 ( SAA3 , [ 28 ] ) is an acute phase gene and its expression in villus epithelial cells is increased in the B6 CF intestine .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: Suppressor of cytokine signaling 3 ( SOCS3 , [ 29 ] ) is an anti - inflammatory gene that interacts with the JAK - STAT pathway and its expression in increased in the B6 CF intestine .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Muclin ( also known as dmbt1 , [ 30 ] ) expression is upregulated in the B6 CF intestine ; it is a cell surface glycoprotein postulated to be an epithelial protective molecule [ 21 , 31 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: Consistent with previous results , Mcpt2 was increased in CF mice on the B6 background by over 9 - fold compared to wild type ( Fig . 2A ) .

text_a: Several genes involved in inflammation and the immune system are located in the regions of the markers identified : TNF superfamily members Tnfsf4 , 6 , and 8 ( chr . 1 , 84 . 9 - 85 cM ) which are involved in T cell activation [ 37 , 38 ] ; three selectin genes ( Sele , Sell , Selp , chr . 1 , 86 . 6 cM ) which are involved in immune cell infiltration into inflamed tissues [ 39 ] ; several members of immune cell surface proteins of the Slam family ( slamf1 , 2 , 5 , 6 , and 9 ; chr . 1 , 89 . 5 - 93 . 3 cM ) [ 40 ] ; the chemokine gene Xcl1 ( chr . 1 , 87 cM ) which is expressed by mast cells and recruits lymphocytes [ 41 ] ; several immunoglobulin Fc receptor genes ( Fcrl3 , Fcgr2b , and Fcgr3 at chr . 1 , 92 . 3 cM ; Fcer1g at chr . 1 , 93 . 3 cM ; Fcer1a at chr . 1 , 94 . 2 cM ) ; the flagellin receptor Tlr5 ( chr . 1 , 98 cM ) ; Mmp3 ( chr . 9 , 1 cM ) which recruits CD4 + lymphocytes [ 42 ] ; Mmp7 ( chr . 9 , 1 cM ) which activates Paneth cell - derived cryptdins ( alpha - defensins ) [ 43 ] ; Icam1 ( chr . 9 , 7 cM ) which is involved in lymphocyte infiltration into inflamed tissues [ 44 ] ; Kitl ( chr . 10 , 57 cM ) which is also known as stem cell factor , and is crucial for mast cell differentiation [ 45 ] ; Im5 ( chr . 10 , 65 cM ) which is involved in antibody - responsiveness [ 46 ] ; Lyzs ( chr . 10 , 66 cM ) which is a Paneth cell product that digests cell walls of bacteria [ 47 ] ; Ifng ( chr . 10 , 67 cM ) which is an important inflammatory signal in CF as well as other conditions [ 48 ] ; Il22 ( chr . 10 , 67 cM ) , a member of the anti - inflammatory IL - 10 interleukin family [ 49 ] ; and the Stat2 and 6 genes ( chr . 10 , 70 cM ) which are important components of intracellular signaling pathways [ 50 ] .

text_a: Altered immune responses may also relate to excessive mucus accumulation in the CF intestine .

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: This work demonstrated that the CF inflammatory phenotype is much less severe in mice with a small contribution of 129 / Sv alleles .

text_a: Because of the inflammation of the CF small intestine , and the possible effects of immune cells on mucus secretion , the genes in the identified regions which are involved in mast cell and neutrophil differentiation and behavior are of special interest as potential CF modifiers .

text_a: Haplotypes at the Tas2r locus on distal chromosome 6 vary with quinine taste sensitivity in inbred mice
label: B-SO O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-Taxon

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The detection of bitter - tasting compounds by the gustatory system is thought to alert animals to the presence of potentially toxic food .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O

text_a: Some , if not all , bitter stimuli activate specific taste receptors , the T2Rs , which are expressed in subsets of taste receptor cells on the tongue and palate .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: However , there is evidence for both receptor - dependent and - independent transduction mechanisms for a number of bitter stimuli , including quinine hydrochloride ( QHCl ) and denatonium benzoate ( DB ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: We used brief - access behavioral taste testing of BXD / Ty recombinant inbred ( RI ) mouse strains to map the major quantitative trait locus ( QTL ) for taste sensitivity to QHCl .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: This QTL is restricted to a ~ 5 Mb interval on chromosome 6 that includes 24 genes encoding T2Rs ( Tas2rs ) .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Tas2rs at this locus display in total 307 coding region single nucleotide polymorphisms ( SNPs ) between the two BXD / Ty RI parental strains , C57BL / 6J ( quinine - sensitive ) and DBA / 2J ( quinine insensitive ) ; approximately 50 % of these mutations are silent .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: Individual RI lines contain exclusively either C57BL / 6J or DBA / 2J Tas2r alleles at this locus , and RI lines containing C57BL / 6J Tas2r alleles are more sensitive to QHCl than are lines containing DBA / 2J alleles .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Thus , the entire Tas2r cluster comprises a large haplotype that correlates with quinine taster status .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O B-CHEBI O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: These studies , the first using a taste - salient assay to map the major QTL for quinine taste , indicate that a T2R - dependent transduction cascade is responsible for the majority of strain variance in quinine taste sensitivity .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O

text_a: Furthermore , the large number of polymorphisms within coding exons of the Tas2r cluster , coupled with evidence that inbred strains exhibit largely similar bitter taste phenotypes , suggest that T2R receptors are quite tolerant to variation .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO I-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Animals use the gustatory system to provide information about food quality .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: For example , sweet - tasting foods may have a high caloric content and are preferred , while bitter - tasting foods often contain toxic substances , and are generally avoided .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: Two families of G protein - coupled receptors ( GPCRs ) expressed in subpopulations of taste receptor cells ( TRCs ) of the gustatory epithelium have been implicated in the detection and transduction of sweet , bitter and umami ( i . e . , glutamate ) taste : T1Rs for sweet - and umami - tasting stimuli [ 1 - 8 ] , and T2Rs for bitter - tasting compounds [ 9 - 11 ] .
label: O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: The genes that encode T2Rs , the Tas2rs , were first identified by database mining of mammalian genomes near chromosomal markers previously linked to differences in bitter taste sensitivity [ 9 , 11 - 18 ] .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In mice , the majority of Tas2rs lie within a single cluster on distal chromosome 6 .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GO O O

text_a: Thirty - three human Tas2rs ( including 8 pseudogenes ) and thirty - six mouse Tas2rs ( including 3 pseudogenes in C57BL / 6J mice ) have been identified [ 9 , 11 , 19 ] , and several of these respond to particular bitter stimuli in heterologous expression assays [ 10 , 20 - 23 ] , or represent a strong candidate gene for a specific bitter taste quantitative trait [ 18 , 24 , 25 ] .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Several quantitative trait loci ( QTL ) have been identified that influence two - bottle intake of bitter stimuli in the mouse , including loci for quinine ( Qui ) [ 12 , 16 , 26 ] , cyclohexamide ( Cyx ) [ 13 ] and sucrose octaacetate ( Soa ) [ 14 , 15 , 17 ] sensitivity .
label: O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-SO O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Each of these QTL map to mouse distal chromosome 6 and are linked to the marker D6Mit13 , which lies within a cluster of 24 intact Tas2rs in the C57BL / 6 genome ( e . g . , [ 16 , 27 , 28 ] ) .
label: O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , the interpretation of these studies remains problematic for two reasons .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: First , the density of chromosomal markers and number of recombinant inbred ( RI ) strains used in these earlier studies did not permit the physical definition of the intervals containing each QTL .
label: O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O

text_a: Second , these previous attempts to map bitter taste QTLs relied on behavioral assays that measured consumption , and were thus susceptible to contributions of post - ingestive effects such as toxicity .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: As we have shown previously , such effects can confound the quantification of bitter taste behaviors [ 29 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Therefore , the relevance and / or contribution of the aforementioned QTLs to bitter taste remain unclear .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , a number of physiological studies have suggested that the transduction of some amphiphilic bitter compounds , such as quinine and denatonium benzoate , may stimulate taste receptor cells independently of GPCRs ( e . g . [ 30 ] ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Quinine may directly activate G proteins , and both quinine and denatonium can block K + channels [ 31 - 36 ] ; caffeine , another bitter - tasting substance , directly inhibits intracellular phosphodiesterase [ 33 ] .
label: B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GO O O O O O

text_a: However , the relative contributions of T2R - dependent and T2R - independent mechanisms to the detection of these bitter stimuli are unknown .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Here we use a taste - salient brief - access lick test [ 29 , 37 ] to measure taste sensitivities in C57BL / 6J ( B6 ) , DBA / 2J ( D2 ) and BXD / Ty ( BXD ) recombinant inbred ( RI ) mice to two bitter stimuli , quinine hydrochloride ( QHCl ) and denatonium benzoate ( DB ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Using 17 BXD lines that were genotyped at 762 informative chromosomal markers , we mapped a major QTL for QHCl taste to a ~ 5 Mb interval on distal chromosome 6 that contains all 24 of the Tas2r genes in the distal cluster .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O

text_a: We analyzed the sequence of each Tas2r allele in the parental strains ( B6 and D2 ) and 29 RI lines .
label: O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This analysis revealed that all 24 genes are polymorphic between the two strains , and that these 24 Tas2rs comprise a single haplotype that correlates with QHCl taste sensitivity .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: The gustatory system of mammals is thought to detect thousands of chemically - diverse bitter - tasting substances [ 41 ] .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Although specific receptors , enzymes and channels have been implicated in the transduction of bitter stimuli , how interactions of bitter stimuli with taste receptor cells lead to cellular activation and signaling to the central nervous system is still poorly understood .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We have found that a single QTL on distal chromosome 6 accounts for most of the variation in QHCL taste sensitivity between B6 and D2 mice .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: This QTL maps to the same chromosomal position as a previously identified QTL for quinine intake , Qui [ 16 , 28 ] , indicating that taste is the major factor in regulating quinine aversion .
label: O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO O B-CHEBI O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: This is an important distinction , as the consumption of bitter - tasting stimuli can be dependent on factors independent of taste , such as toxicity [ 29 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Using 17 RI lines and 762 chromosomal markers , we have restricted the quinine taste QTL to a < 5 Mb region on distal chromosome 6 that contains 24 Tas2r genes .
label: O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: At least 60 other genes also lie within this interval , including two genes that encode proline - rich salivary proteins , Prp2 and Prh1 ; these proteins appear to play no direct role in bitter taste [ 48 ] .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Tas2rs are the most likely candidates for the QHCl quantitative trait gene ( s ) due to : ( 1 ) their expression in taste receptor cells and ( 2 ) genetic and functional evidence linking them to the detection of a number of bitter taste stimuli .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: As of yet there is no evidence for quinine activation of T2Rs from functional assays of these receptors in heterologous cells or membrane preparations , likely due to the lipophilic nature of quinine [ 23 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-GO O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: However , several physiological studies have suggested that quinine can directly activate G proteins or cationic conductances , or can block K + channels in taste receptor cells [ 34 - 36 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: While our data indicates that quinine taste is largely T2R - dependent , it is not exclusively so .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For example , the BXD RI lines exhibited a range of quinine sensitivity , with several strains having similar sensitivities to that of B6 , some strains with sensitivities similar to that of D2 , and a third group with a more intermediate phenotype ( Figures 1 , 7 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This observation is consistent with a polygenic basis for quinine taste [ 16 , 26 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: Also , a suggestive QTL on chromosome 8 does not contain any Tas2r genes , but does contain a number of genes encoding ion channels , enzymes and members of other receptor families ( our unpublished data ) .
label: O O O O B-SO O B-GO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O B-CHEBI O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It will be interesting to determine whether this suggestive QTL is linked to quinine taste and , if so , whether it is specific for this single bitter stimulus or more broadly related to all bitter taste .

text_a: It is somewhat puzzling that 22 of the 24 Tas2rs examined encode variant proteins in B6 and D2 mice even though these strains exhibit similar taste responses to bitter compounds such as DB or cyclohexamide [ 47 ] .

text_a: Taken together , these observations suggest that Tas2rs are quite tolerant of variation , and that perhaps most of the differences observed do not affect domains important for ligand interactions or receptor - mediated signaling mechanisms .

text_a: Analysis of sequence diversity of Tas2rs in humans , great apes and old world monkeys suggest that Tas2rs are subject to some degree of positive selection [ 43 , 44 ] .
