text_a: It is possible that B6 and D2 mice , which have a similar origin in the early 20th century , inherited different Tas2r haplotypes present in wild mouse populations prior to inbreeding .

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: In conclusion , we have found that sensitivity to the bitter - tasting substance quinine , as assayed by a taste specific brief - access test , is a polygenic trait in mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: However , the major mechanism for quinine taste transduction is likely dependent on one or more T2R receptors .

text_a: Most Tas2r genes in the distal chromosome 6 cluster are polymorphic across inbred strains of mice , and this cluster forms a single haplotype that correlates with quinine taste sensitivity .

text_a: A screen for proteins that interact with PAX6 : C - terminal mutations disrupt interaction with HOMER3 , DNCL1 and TRIM11
label: O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GGP O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-SO O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The PAX6 protein is a transcriptional regulator with a key role in ocular and neurological development .
label: O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Individuals with heterozygous loss - of - function mutations in the PAX6 gene have malformations of the eye and brain .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: Little is known about the interactions of PAX6 with other proteins , so we carried out a systematic screen for proteins that interact with PAX6 .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GGP O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: We used bioinformatics techniques to characterise a highly conserved peptide at the C - terminus of the PAX6 protein .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O

text_a: Yeast two - hybrid library screens were then carried out to identify brain - expressed proteins that interact with the C - terminal peptide and with the entire PAX6 proline - serine - threonine - rich domain .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-SO O O O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O B-SO O

text_a: Three novel PAX6 - interacting proteins were identified : the post - synaptic density ( PSD ) protein HOMER3 , the dynein subunit DNCL1 , and the tripartite motif protein TRIM11 .
label: O O B-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O B-GO O B-CHEBI B-GGP O O B-GO O B-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI B-GGP O

text_a: Three C - terminal PAX6 mutations , previously identified in patients with eye malformations , all reduced or abolished the interactions .
label: O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: Our preliminary data suggest that PAX6 interacts with HOMER3 , DNCL1 and TRIM11 .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: We propose that the interaction of PAX6 with HOMER3 and DNCL1 is a mechanism by which synaptic activation could lead to changes in neuronal transcriptional activity , and that some of the neural anomalies in patients with PAX6 mutations could be explained by impaired protein - protein interactions .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The PAX6 protein is a member of the PAX ( paired - box ) family of transcriptional regulators and is essential for normal ocular and neural development [ 1 ] .
label: O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Heterozygous mutations of the human PAX6 gene cause aniridia ( absence of the iris ) and a range of other congenital eye malformations [ 2 ] .
label: O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Neural defects such as foveal hypoplasia and optic nerve hypoplasia are common in PAX6 - associated eye disease [ 3 - 5 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Homozygous mutations in man and mouse are lethal and result in severe developmental abnormalities including anophthalmia , severe reduction of the olfactory structures and gross brain malformations [ 2 , 6 ] .
label: O B-SO O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The roles of PAX6 in brain development have mainly been studied in homozygous mutant mice or rats and include arealisation of the cerebral cortex [ 7 ] , formation of the prosencephalon - mesencephalon boundary [ 8 ] , axon guidance [ 8 ] , differentiation of neurons from glia [ 9 ] and neuronal migration in the cerebellum [ 10 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: The discovery of multiple and diverse roles for PAX6 in brain development prompted MRI analyses of aniridia patients , and a range of distinctive brain anomalies were uncovered .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The most common and striking of these was absence or hypoplasia of the anterior commissure [ 11 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Other defects included absence or hypoplasia of the pineal gland , cortical polymicrogyria , white matter changes in the corpus callosum and grey matter changes in the cerebellum [ 11 - 13 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Functional changes included hyposmia and abnormal inter - hemispheric auditory transfer [ 11 , 14 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The defining feature of all PAX proteins is the presence of a 128 amino acid DNA - binding paired domain that has been highly conserved over evolution [ 1 ] .
label: O O B-SO O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: In addition to the paired domain , PAX6 also contains a DNA - binding homeodomain and a proline , serine and threonine - rich ( PST ) domain at the C - terminus [ 1 , 6 ] .
label: O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O

text_a: The PST domain , which encompasses the C - terminal 145 amino acids of PAX6 , has been shown to act as a transcriptional activator [ 6 ] .
label: O O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The PAX6 protein directly regulates a wide range of target genes [ 1 , 2 ] including Pax2 [ 15 ] , Ngn2 [ 16 ] and glucagon [ 17 ] .
label: O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: The Pax6 gene has a spatially and temporally complex expression pattern in the eye , brain , nasal structures , spinal cord and pancreas [ 1 ] .
label: O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although PAX6 is clearly involved in multiple developmental processes , common themes are now emerging concerning the role of PAX6 in neural tissues .
label: O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: Gradients of Pax6 expression are important for determining positional characteristics in the retina [ 18 ] and the neocortex [ 7 ] .
label: O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: PAX6 plays a role in development of specific axonal connections between the retina and the brain [ 18 ] and within the forebrain [ 8 , 19 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is also involved in the differentiation of neural cell types from multipotent precursors in the retina [ 16 ] and the cerebral cortex [ 9 ] through activation of bHLH genes such as Ngn2 and Mash1 .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: These studies provide a clear link between PAX6 function in the retina and the brain , and are of particular relevance to the neurological phenotypes of individuals with PAX6 mutations .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: It is becoming apparent that transcription factors do not act in isolation but are dependent on interactions with other proteins to carry out their function [ 20 , 21 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These interactions introduce more specificity into the regulatory function of a given transcription factor .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To date only three PAX6 protein - protein interactions have been described : with SOX2 on the lens - specific enhancer element of the delta - crystallin gene [ 22 ] ; with MDIA , which modulates PAX6 activity in early neuronal development [ 23 ] , and with MAF proteins on the glucagon promoter , which causes increased expression of this pancreatic hormone gene [ 17 ] .
label: O O O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-SO O O O O

text_a: Here we report the preliminary results of the first systematic screen for proteins that interact with PAX6 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GGP O

text_a: We used sequence alignment algorithms and secondary structure prediction programs to define a new domain of 32 amino acids at the C - terminal end of the PAX6 protein .
label: O O B-SO O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O

text_a: We then screened a brain library with this peptide using the yeast two - hybrid technique and identified three novel interacting proteins , HOMER3 , DNCL1 and TRIM11 .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: The interaction between PAX6 and these proteins was disrupted by naturally occurring C - terminal PAX6 mutations .
label: O O O B-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O B-SO I-SO B-SO I-SO I-SO B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: Synopsis
label: O

text_a: Medium - chain acyl - CoA dehydrogenase ( MCAD ) deficiency is one of the most common inherited disorders of metabolism .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This defect in fatty acid oxidation can lead to severe and sometimes fatal disease , especially in young children because they are unable to tolerate a fasting episode .
label: O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Metabolic complications include very low blood glucose concentrations and generation of toxic by - products .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O

text_a: This disorder can result in sudden infant death .
label: O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Using a process known as gene targeting in mouse embryonic stem cells , the authors have developed a mouse model with the same enzyme deficiency .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: This mouse model of MCAD deficiency develops many of the same disease characteristics found in affected children .

text_a: The MCAD - deficient mouse model shows a high rate of newborn loss , intolerance to cold , and the characteristic biochemical changes in the blood , tissues , and urine that are very similar to those found in the human disease counterpart .

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Mitochondrial beta - oxidation of fatty acids provides energy , especially during fasting conditions .
label: B-GO O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: Fatty acid oxidation occurs in mitochondria and consists of a repeating circuit of four sequential steps .
label: B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: There are four straight - chain acyl - CoA dehydrogenases involved in the initial step .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: Medium - chain acyl - CoA dehydrogenase ( MCAD ) ( the mouse gene is Acadm , whereas the protein is MCAD ) , specifically , is responsible for catalyzing the dehydrogenation of medium - chain length ( C6 - C12 ) fatty acid thioesters [ 1 ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon B-SO O B-GGP O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Acadm is transcribed in the nucleus , translated in the cytosol , and translocated into the mitochondrial matrix [ 2 - 4 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O B-GO O O O O B-GO O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Once inside the mitochondrial matrix , the MCAD monomers are assembled into homotetramers to gain enzymatic activity [ 4 ] .
label: O O O B-GO I-GO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: MCAD activity is essential for complete fatty acid oxidation .
label: B-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O

text_a: Inherited MCAD deficiency exists in humans as an autosomal recessive disorder .
label: O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O B-GO O O O

text_a: MCAD deficiency was first described in 1982 -- 1983 [ 5 - 7 ] and has been described in numerous patients [ 1 , 8 - 11 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The carrier frequency in the Caucasian population has been estimated to be between 1 in 50 to 80 with an incidence of clinical disease expected at around 1 in 15 , 000 [ 1 , 9 , 12 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: MCAD - deficient patients exhibit clinical episodes often associated with fasting .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Patients manifest disease usually during the first two years of life .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Symptoms include hypoketotic hypoglycemia and Reye - like episodes [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is estimated that approximately 59 % of patients presenting clinically between 15 to 26 mo of age die during their first clinical episode [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The pathogenesis of the wide range of metabolic disturbances in MCAD deficiency is poorly understood and certain aspects of patient management are controversial .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: An animal model for MCAD deficiency is essential to better understand the pathogenesis of MCAD deficiency and to develop better management regimens for human patients .
label: O B-Taxon O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: To gain further insight into the mechanisms of this disease , we developed a mouse model of MCAD deficiency by gene targeting in embryonic stem ( ES ) cells ( for reviews [ 13 , 14 ] ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The mutant mice had many relevant features characteristic of the disease found in human MCAD - deficient patients , along with some unexpected findings .
label: O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Ablation of the Sam68 RNA Binding Protein Protects Mice from Age - Related Bone Loss
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: The Src substrate associated in mitosis of 68 kDa ( Sam68 ) is a KH - type RNA binding protein that has been shown to regulate several aspects of RNA metabolism ; however , its physiologic role has remained elusive .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-SO O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Herein we report the generation of Sam68 - nan mice by homologous recombination .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Aged Sam68 - / - mice preserved their bone mass , in sharp contrast with 12 - month - old wild - type littermates in which bone mass was decreased up to approximately 75 % .
label: O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In fact , the bone volume of the 12 - month - old Sam68 - / - mice was virtually indistinguishable from that of 4 - month - old wild - type or Sam68 - / - mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Sam68 - / - bone marrow stromal cells had a differentiation advantage for the osteogenic pathway .
label: B-GGP O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Moreover , the knockdown of Sam68 using short hairpin RNA in the embryonic mesenchymal multipotential progenitor C3H10T1 / 2 cells resulted in more pronounced expression of the mature osteoblast marker osteocalcin when differentiation was induced with bone morphogenetic protein - 2 .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-GGP O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: Cultures of mouse embryo fibroblasts generated from Sam68 + / + and Sam68 - / - littermates were induced to differentiate into adipocytes with culture medium containing pioglitazone and the Sam68 - / - mouse embryo fibroblasts shown to have impaired adipocyte differentiation .
label: O O B-Taxon O B-CL O O B-GGP B-SO O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O B-CL O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: Furthermore , in vivo it was shown that sections of bone from 12 - month - old Sam68 - / - mice had few marrow adipocytes compared with their age - matched wild - type littermate controls , which exhibited fatty bone marrow .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O B-CL O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Our findings identify endogenous Sam68 as a positive regulator of adipocyte differentiation and a negative regulator of osteoblast differentiation , which is consistent with Sam68 being a modulator of bone marrow mesenchymal cell differentiation , and hence bone metabolism , in aged mice .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Synopsis
label: O

text_a: Osteoporosis is a debilitating bone disease that is characterized by reduced bone mass and microarchitectural damage , which result in increased bone fragility and susceptibility to fracture .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Peak bone mass , which is achieved by the age of 30 in humans , has been identified as a major determinant of resistance or susceptibility to osteoporosis .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The authors generated mice deficient for the Sam68 RNA binding protein , a protein of unknown physiologic function .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: The mice develop normally and are protected against bone loss during aging .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Age - related bone loss has long been associated with an increase in marrow adipocytes , which are derived from the same mesenchymal lineage as osteoblasts in bone marrow .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: The authors showed that Sam68 regulates the differentiation of this mesenchymal lineage , such that in its absence , osteoblasts continued to be generated in aging bone , leading to preservation of bone mass .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This study identifies a physiologic role for Sam68 as a modulator of the bone marrow stem cell niche and hence of bone metabolism .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: The data identify Sam68 as a potential therapeutic target for the prevention and treatment of age - related bone loss .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: During skeletal development , the anabolic activity of osteoblasts [ 1 ] is favored over the catabolic activity of osteoclasts [ 2 ] , which results in a net gain in bone mass .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: At skeletal maturity , bone mass is maintained through the balanced activity of osteoblasts and osteoclasts during the remodeling cycle .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: During skeletal aging , there is a shift in the balance that favors osteoclast over osteoblast activity , which results in net bone loss [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The amount and rate at which bone is gained during development and lost during aging are determined in large part by genetics [ 4 - 6 ] but also by physical activity and by alterations in the availability and response of bone cells to circulating hormones [ 7 - 9 ] and locally derived growth factors [ 10 , 11 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Whereas genetic - based studies have provided novel insights into the pathways that regulate bone development [ 12 - 14 ] , relatively little is known about the etiology of age - related bone loss .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Increased bone resorption in elderly men and women is associated with a reduction in bone mass and an increase in circulating levels of bone biomarkers [ 15 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These changes have been attributed primarily to nutritional deficits resulting in alterations in the parathyroid hormone - vitamin D axis [ 16 ] , to gonadal hormone deficiency [ 17 ] , to leptin levels and the sympathetic nervous system [ 8 , 18 - 20 ] , and to alterations in bone cell apoptosis [ 21 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: Bone loss in the elderly has also been attributed to alterations in the response of bone marrow stromal cells to their microenvironment that favors differentiation down the adipocyte lineage rather than the osteoblast lineage [ 22 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: Aging has long been associated with an increase in marrow fat , where the generation of adipocytes is favored over osteoblasts [ 23 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: Osteoblasts and adipocytes are derived from a common mesenchymal precursor cell present in bone marrow , and the factors that control this age - induced switch toward adipogenic differentiation is not well understood [ 24 ] .
label: B-CL O B-CL O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: While several transcriptional regulatory proteins have been associated with cell fate determination of bone marrow mesenchymal cells , including peroxisome proliferator - activated receptor gamma ( PPAR gamma ) and KLF5 [ 25 - 30 ] , the role of RNA binding proteins in this process remains unknown .
label: O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CL O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: RNA binding proteins of the KH type are known regulators of cellular differentiation .
label: B-SO O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-SO O O B-CL O O

text_a: For example , expression defects in the KH domain proteins NOVA and FMRP are known to cause paraneoplastic neurologic disorders [ 31 ] and the fragile X syndrome , respectively , in humans [ 32 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO B-CHEBI O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: The phenotype of the quaking viable mice suggests a role for the QUAKING RNA binding protein in oligodendrocytes and myelination [ 33 ] .
label: O O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Indeed , the ectopic expression of the QKI - 6 / 7 isoforms in vivo led to the formation of glial cells rather than neurons from neural progenitor , demonstrating its role in cell fate determination [ 34 ] .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O B-CL O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: The loss of GLD - 1 protein in Caenorhabditis elegans prevents the appearance of stem cells [ 35 ] , and the absence of the KH domain protein HOW in Drosophila prevents muscle differentiation and results in flies with held - out - wings [ 36 , 37 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-CHEBI O B-Taxon I-Taxon O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-CHEBI B-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The Src substrate associated in mitosis of 68 kDa ( Sam68 ) is also a member of the family of KH domain RNA binding proteins [ 38 ] ; however , its physiologic role has remained undefined .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Sam68 was identified as an SH3 and SH2 domain interacting protein for Src family kinases and is also a known substrate of Src kinases [ 39 - 42 ] and of the breast tumor kinase [ 43 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O

text_a: Sam68 has been shown to facilitate the export of unspliced HIV RNA [ 44 ] and to regulate pre - mRNA processing [ 45 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O

text_a: In the present paper , we report the generation of Sam68 - / - mice and analysis of their skeletal phenotype .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: Our data indicate that the absence of Sam68 confers resistance to age - related bone loss in mice such that old Sam68 have a higher bone mass than their wild - type littermates .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O

text_a: We provide evidence that Sam68 regulates the differentiation of bone marrow stromal cells by showing that cells isolated from Sam68 - / - animals had enhanced osteogenic activity and decreased adipogenic activity than those harvested from wild - type littermates .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-CL O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O

text_a: Furthermore , Sam68 - / - mouse embryo fibroblasts ( MEFs ) were impaired in their capacity to differentiate into adipocytes , consistent with Sam68 being a regulator of bone marrow mesenchymal cell differentiation .
label: O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O

text_a: These results also characterize a new animal model to study bone metabolism , regeneration , and repair during aging .

text_a: It will be important to demonstrate that a similar effect is observed using primary bone marrow stromal cells from aged Sam68 - / - mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Similar findings were observed when embryonic mesenchymal multipotential progenitor cells C3H10T1 / 2 treated with Sam68 shRNA , were differentiated into osteoblasts with BMP2 .
label: O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-CL O B-GGP O

text_a: Our findings that aged Sam68 - / - mice do not develop fatty bone marrow and that MEFs derived from Sam68 - / - mice have impaired adipocyte differentiation , indicate that Sam68 regulates both adipocyte and osteoblast differentiation .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O B-CL O O O O B-GGP O O B-CL O B-CL O O

text_a: These findings identify Sam68 as the first RNA binding protein to regulate mesenchymal cell differentiation and the challenge will be to identify the specific RNA targets that it regulates during this process .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O B-CHEBI O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: The fact that osteoblast function is altered in Src - / - mice [ 60 , 61 ] raises the possibility that preservation of bone mass in the Sam68 - / - mice could be linked with and regulated by Src .
label: O O O B-CL O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: The pathway by which leptin regulates bone resorption was identified to involve the sympathetic nervous system relaying to the osteoblasts via the beta - adrenergic pathway leading to the release of growth factors including RANKL that causes the osteoclasts to thrive [ 8 , 18 - 20 ] .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The lowering of leptin levels in aged Sam68 - / - mice is consistent with these mice having a high bone mass compared with their aged littermates .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These data would suggest that the leptin - sympathetic pathway is unaltered in Sam68 - / - mice and that the lowering of leptin may explain the lower levels of CTX in the serum of Sam68 - / - mice .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: These findings suggest that Sam68 may be regulating bone metabolism at two different levels : ( 1 ) the absence of Sam68 results in lower leptin levels that may reduce bone resorption via the sympathetic nervous system and ( 2 ) the absence of Sam68 favors osteoblast , rather than adipocyte , differentiation .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-CL O O O B-CL O O O

text_a: In conclusion , our data define a physiologic role for Sam68 in bone metabolism and bone marrow mesenchymal stem cell differentiation .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O

text_a: The bone phenotype observed in Sam68 - / - mice imply that inhibitors of Sam68 could prevent age - related bone loss .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP O O O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , the results also suggest that Sam68 expression levels , hypomorphism , and mutations in humans may influence susceptibility to marrow adipocyte accumulation and osteoporosis .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: Our findings also identify a new animal model to study aging bone loss .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: mu - calpain and m - calpain are ubiquitously expressed proteases implicated in cellular migration , cell cycle progression , degenerative processes and cell death .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O B-CL O O O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: These heterodimeric enzymes are composed of distinct catalytic subunits , encoded by Capn1 ( mu - calpain ) or Capn2 ( m - calpain ) , and a common regulatory subunit encoded by Capn4 .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: Disruption of the mouse Capn4 gene abolished both mu - calpain and m - calpain activity , and resulted in embryonic lethality , thereby suggesting essential roles for one or both of these enzymes during mammalian embryogenesis .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Disruption of the Capn1 gene produced viable , fertile mice implying that either m - calpain could compensate for the loss of mu - calpain , or that the loss of m - calpain was responsible for death of Capn4 - / - mice .
label: O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: To distinguish between the alternatives described above , we deleted an essential coding region in the mouse Capn2 gene in embryonic stems cells and transmitted this mutant allele through the mouse germline .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-SO B-SO O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Breeding of heterozygous animals failed to produce homozygous mutant live offspring or implanted embryos .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: A nested PCR genotyping protocol was established , and homozygous preimplantation mutant embryos were detected at the morula but not at the blastocyts stage .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: We conclude that homozygous disruption of the Capn2 gene results in pre - implantation embryonic lethality between the morula and blastocyst stage .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This establishes that mu - calpain and m - calpain have distinct functions , and that m - calpain is vital for development of the preimplantation murine embryo .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The two ubiquitous Ca2 + - dependent , cysteine proteases known as mu - calpain ( calpain - 1 ) and m - calpain ( capain - 2 ) , are the founding members of a gene family comprising 13 genes in mammals [ 1 - 3 ] .
label: O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: Both are heterodimeric enzymes consisting of distinct 80 kDa catalytic subunits , encoded by the Capn1 ( mu - 80 k ) and Capn2 ( m - 80 k ) genes , respectively , that associate with a common 28 kDa regulatory subunit encoded by the Capn4 gene .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: The mu - 80 k and m - 80 k subunits share 62 % amino acid sequence identity , and are very similar in terms of structure , protein chemistry , and in vitro substrate specificity .
label: O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: Despite these similarities , the differential expression patterns of mu - and m - calpain in mammalian tissues suggest they have some isoform specific and distinct functions .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: The mu and m designations derive from the levels of Ca2 + required in vitro for optimal activation ; 10 - 50 mu M Ca2 + for mu - calpain and 0 . 3 - 0 . 35 mM Ca2 + for m - calpain .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: It is generally assumed that mu - and m - calpain maintain their differential sensitivities to calcium in vivo , although this has not yet been strictly demonstrated .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , since the cytoplasmic free Ca2 + concentration is typically less than 1 mu M , it is also assumed that other in vivo factors must contribute to regulation of these enzymes [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O B-GO O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Without apriori knowledge of the factors regulating calpain activity or their relevant substrates , elucidation of biological functions for calpains presents a challenge .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Research on calpains has linked them with a wide variety of functions including muscle growth , development , degeneration ( 3 ) , neuronal growth and neurodegeneration [ 4 ] , cell cycle progression [ 5 , 6 ] , signal cascades triggered by integrins and growth factors [ 7 ] , membrane protrusion [ 8 ] , remodeling of the cytoskeleton and cell migration [ 9 - 15 ] , and regulation of cell death via both necrosis and apoptosis [ 16 - 22 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O B-GO O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To date , the literature suggests a complex interplay between caspases and calpains [ 23 , 24 ] and impact of calpain on cell death pathway components [ 25 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: The lack of highly specific cell - permeable inhibitors of calpains contributes to the challenge of investigating and defining calpain functions in these processes .
label: O O O O O B-CL O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although over - expression of calpastatin , the endogenous protein inhibitor of mu - and m - calpain provides an important approach for these efforts , it will not distinguish isoform specific functions [ 24 , 26 , 27 ] .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Some work has suggested isoform specific roles , such as a role for m - calpain in epidermal growth factor ( EGF ) - induced cell motility [ 28 , 29 ] and a role for mu - calpain in interferon - inducible protein 9 - induced migration of keratinocytes [ 28 ] .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: Although calpain activity was first identified four decades ago , a clear understanding of the substrates and functions of the enzymes has remained elusive .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: In large part , this has been due to the lack of inhibitors capable of specifically down - regulating the calpains without affecting other proteases .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the past decade , the story has been further complicated by the discovery of a number of previously unknown isoforms which may be differently regulated and have different substrate specificity .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Gene targeting in mice has provided a powerful approach to examine the physiologic roles of individual calpain isoforms .
label: B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: This was first used to disrupt the Capn4 gene , encoding the small regulatory subunit common to both mu - and m - calpain .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Two independent laboratories observed embryonic lethality in Capn4 knockout mice , albeit at different stages of development [ 31 , 32 ] .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These observations supported the hypothesis that the small subunit is required for both mu - and m - calpain , and furthermore suggested four possibilities regarding their requirement for embryonic development : 1 ) both isoforms were required ; 2 ) mu - calpain was required ; 3 ) m - calpain was required , or 4 ) mu - and m - calpain are redundant , and one or the other isoform was required .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: These options were narrowed down by the subsequent observation that Capn1 - / - mice , which lack the mu - calpain catalytic subunit , were healthy and fertile , although platelet aggregation and clot retraction defects were observed [ 33 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: At that point , we were left with the last two possibilities that either m - calpain was specifically required during embryogenesis , or that either isoform alone was sufficient for sustaining embryonic viability .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: We report here that Capn2 - / - mice , which lack the m - calpain catalytic subunit , die at the preimplantation stage of development .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This observation allows us to now conclude that m - calpain is specifically required during embryogenesis .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Since homozygous disruption of the Capn4 gene was also expected to abolish m - calpain activity , this result is in agreement with the phenotype presented by one of the two Capn4 targeted lines in which preimplantation lethality of nan embryos was also observed [ 32 ] .
label: O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The survival of Capn4 - / - embryos from the original targeted line reported by Arthur and colleagues to mid - gestation is more difficult to reconcile [ 31 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In retrospect , it seems likely that the latter line represents a hypomorphic state , rather than a true nan .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The Capn4 targeting strategy employed by Arthur and colleagues involved disrupting the C - terminus of the calpain small subunit by insertion of the PGK - Neo cassette into the middle of exon 9 , which caused truncation of the protein [ 31 ] .

text_a: Deficits in spatial learning and motor coordination in ADAM11 - deficient mice
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: ADAM11 is a member of the ADAM gene family and is mainly expressed in the nervous system .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is thought to be an adhesion molecule , since it has a disintegrin - like domain related to cell - cell or cell - matrix interactions .
label: O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O B-CL O B-GO O O

text_a: To elucidate the physiological functions of ADAM11 , we generated ADAM11 - deficient mice by means of gene targeting .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O B-SO O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: ADAM11 - deficient mice were apparently normal , and survived more than one year with no major histological abnormalities in the brain or spinal cord .
label: B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Because ADAM11 is highly expressed in the hippocampus and cerebellum , we have examined ADAM11 mutant mice for learning using visual and hidden water maze tasks , and their motor coordination using a rotating rod task .
label: O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Our results showed that their visual water maze task results are normal , but the hidden water maze and rotating rod task skills are impaired in ADAM11 - deficient mice .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: Our results indicate that ADAM11 mutation does not affect cell migration and differentiation during development , but affects learning and motor coordination .
label: O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Thus , ADAM11 might play an important signalling or structural role as a cell adhesion molecule at the synapse , and may thus participate in synaptic regulation underlying behavioural changes .
label: O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CHEBI O O B-GO O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The ADAM ( A Disintegrin And Metalloprotease ) family comprises membrane - spanning multi - domain proteins containing a metalloproteinase - like domain and a disintegrin - like domain .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O B-SO B-CHEBI O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Approximately half of the ADAMs are catalytically active metalloproteases that shed a broad range of substrates , such as cytokines , growth factors , receptors , adhesion molecules [ 1 , 2 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: Recent gene - disruption studies in mice have disclosed a physiological role of each ADAM .
label: O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For example , ADAM10 , ADAM17 and ADAM19 are critical for normal development by providing growth signals at the correct times and places [ 3 - 6 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In contrast , the functions of ADAM8 , ADAM9 , ADAM12 and ADAM15 are not essential for embryogenesis , suggesting a possible functional redundancy with other protease [ 7 - 10 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The remaining half , which are non - protease - ADAMs , are thought to be adhesion molecules .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: More than ten ADAMs have been shown to support integrin - mediated cell adhesion in vitro [ 11 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: More recently , the finding has been reported that integrin - mediated cell migration of tissue culture cells can be controlled by distinct ADAMs [ 12 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-CL O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In C . elegans , unc - 71 gene coding a non - protease - ADAM protein have been shown to be involved in cell migration events in vivo [ 13 ] .
label: O B-Taxon I-Taxon I-Taxon O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , the physiological roles of mammalian non - protease - ADAMs are poorly understood in vivo .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Genetic deletion studies in mice have shown that both Adam2 - nan and Adam3 - nan male mutants are infertile and their spermatozoa lack egg - binding abilities [ 14 - 16 ] .
label: B-SO B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O B-CL O B-CL O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The precise mechanism is under investigation [ 17 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We have reported the findings of ADAM11 , ADAM22 and ADAM23 genes and their restricted expression in the human and murine nervous systems [ 18 , 19 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: These ADAMs lack a catalytic motif critical for the metalloproteinase activity , suggesting that they are not proteases .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We assume that these ADAMs might contribute to cell migration , differentiation and survival or synaptic regulation by binding to integrins , cell - surface proteins or intracellular signalling molecules [ 20 , 21 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O B-GO O O O O B-GO O B-GO I-GO I-GO B-CHEBI O B-GO O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: We have reported severe ataxia , seizures , and death before weaning , accompanied with hypomyelination of the peripheral nervous system in Adam22 - nan mutant mice [ 22 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: It has been reported that the disruption of Adam23 gene in the mouse results in premature death associated with ataxia and tremor [ 23 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Is spite of such extreme phenotypes , no histological defects in the brain has been observed in either Adam22 - nan nor Adam23 - nan mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O

text_a: ADAM11 is the closest paralog of ADAM22 and ADAM23 , and its orthologs have been found in vertebrates , but not in invertebrates .
label: B-GGP O O O B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: It has been reported that the Xenopus ADAM11 ortholog , xMDC11a , has an expression pattern associated with neural development , with a proposed role in cell migration [ 24 ] ; and it has been reported in analyses using Northern blot and in situ hybridisation methods that the murine Adam11 gene is expressed in both the developing and adult nervous system [ 19 , 25 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon B-GGP B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These findings led us to hypothesise that ADAM11 is an integrin binder that plays an important role in the nervous system , as do ADAM22 and ADAM23 .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: To determine the physiological functions of ADAM11 , we generated and analysed Adam11 gene - targeted mice .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O B-Taxon O

label: O

label: O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon

label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: As a result of this procedure , since a termination codon was introduced in exon 5 in the pro - protein domain , only the truncated form of the ADAM11 protein would be synthesised from this targeted allele .

text_a: The gain in body weight of ( - / - ) mice was comparable to that of ( + / + ) and ( + / - ) mice at least until 24 weeks of age ( data not shown ) .

text_a: The brain of ( - / - ) mice , including the hippocampus ( Fig . 1D ) and cerebellum ( Fig . 1E ) appeared normal after HE staining when ( + / + ) , ( + / - ) and ( - / - ) mice were compared .

text_a: Adam11 ( - / - ) mice were found to take a significantly longer time to locate the hidden platform than ( + / + ) and ( + / - ) mice ( Fig . 2A ) .

text_a: Nonetheless , the ability of ( + / + ) , ( + / - ) and ( - / - ) mice to find the hidden platform improved over test sessions ( Fig . 2A ) .

text_a: Thus , ( + / + ) , ( + / - ) and ( - / - ) mice were able to learn the location of the hidden platform during the course of the trials , although the capacity of ( - / - ) mice to find the platform was lower than that of ( + / + ) and ( + / - ) mice .

text_a: Genome - wide isolation of growth and obesity QTL using mouse speed congenic strains
label: B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: High growth ( hg ) modifier and background independent quantitative trait loci ( QTL ) affecting growth , adiposity and carcass composition were previously identified on mouse chromosomes ( MMU ) 1 , 2 , 5 , 8 , 9 , 11 and 17 .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-GO O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To confirm and further characterize each QTL , two panels of speed congenic strains were developed by introgressing CAST / EiJ ( CAST ) QTL alleles onto either mutant C57Bl / 6J - hg / hg ( HG ) or wild type C57Bl / 6J ( B6 ) genetic backgrounds .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: The first speed congenic panel was developed by introgressing four overlapping donor regions spanning MMU2 in its entirety onto both HG and B6 backgrounds , for a total of eight strains .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Phenotypic characterization of the MMU2 panel confirmed the segregation of multiple growth and obesity QTL and strongly suggested that a subset of these loci modify the effects of the hg deletion .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: The second panel consisted of individual donor regions on an HG background for each QTL on MMU1 , 5 , 8 , 9 , 11 and 17 .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Of the six developed strains , five were successfully characterized and displayed significant differences in growth and / or obesity as compared to controls .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: All five displayed phenotypes similar to those originally attributed to each QTL , however , novel phenotypes were unmasked in several of the strains including sex - specific effects .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: The speed congenic strains developed herein constitute an invaluable genomic resource and provide the foundation to identify the specific nature of genetic variation influencing growth and obesity .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The use of mouse models has provided valuable insight into the etiology of monogenic syndromes caused by single gene mutations .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O

text_a: However , such models do not mimic the genetic complexity of disease traits commonly seen in the human population .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Complex traits , such as polygenic growth and obesity are influenced by the small to moderate direct effects of quantitative trait loci ( QTL ) , epistasis between QTL alleles , environmental perturbations and QTL - environment interactions .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: To date numerous mouse growth and obesity QTL have been localized [ 1 , 2 ] , however , little progress has been made in determining the specific nature of the underlying genetic variants .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O

text_a: One resource used to fine map QTL are congenic strains which are designed to convert a complex polygenic trait into one that is mono - or oligogenic .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This is accomplished by eliminating segregating genetic variation outside the locus of interest and reducing the environmental variation influencing a trait by characterizing large numbers of genetically identical mice .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O

text_a: The Complex Trait Consortium ( CTC ) considers congenic analysis an excellent method to confirm and subsequently fine map QTL [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Traditionally , congenic strains are developed by introgressing QTL alleles from a donor strain , whose boundaries are defined by genetic markers , on the genetic background of a recipient strain via 10 backcrosses [ 4 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: While technically straightforward this is a time consuming endeavor taking over three years to construct a single strain .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The speed congenic approach is an alternative to this lengthy process and can reduce the number of required backcrosses from 10 to five [ 5 , 6 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This strategy uses marker - assisted selection to identify male mice inheriting fewer donor alleles , than expected on average , during each backcross .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Numerous traditionally developed and speed congenics have been used to successfully isolate mouse QTL for a wide array of traits , including growth and obesity [ 7 - 13 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The C57Bl / 6J - hg / hg ( HG ) mouse is a model of systemic overgrowth resulting from a spontaneous deletion on MMU10 , which eliminates expression of the Socs2 ( suppressor of cytokine signaling 2 ) gene [ 14 - 16 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: The role of Socs2 in the HG phenotype was confirmed by an independently engineered Socs2 - / - knockout mouse which shared a number of phenotypes in common with HG , including gigantism [ 17 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: QTL which alter the phenotypic effects of another locus are referred to as modifier QTL [ 18 ] .
label: B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Modifier QTL have been mapped for numerous traits and in these studies the modified locus is typically a known gene containing a spontaneously arisen or engineered mutation with major phenotypic effects , such as hg [ 11 , 19 - 21 ] .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Epistasis forms the basis of these interactions , implying that the known gene and its modifiers are members of the same biochemical or metabolic pathway .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Different genetic backgrounds have been shown to modify the growth - enhancing effects of hg [ 15 , 22 ] .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Since the primary function of Socs2 is to negatively regulate growth hormone ( Gh ) [ 23 ] , it is likely these background effects are the result of polymorphism influencing interactions between members of the Gh signaling pathway .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O

text_a: Thus , identification of hg modifiers has the potential to uncover novel members of metabolically important pathways or previously unknown convergences between pathways .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: As an initial step , growth and carcass composition QTL were identified in a cross between CAST / EiJ ( CAST ) and HG [ 24 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the F2 , mice homozygous for the hg deletion ( hg / hg ) and wild type ( + / + ) were assayed and hg modifier QTL were defined as those either absent in + / + mice and segregating in hg / hg or loci with altered gene action dependent on background .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Four hg modifier QTL ( Wg2 on MMU2 , Carfhg2 on MMU9 , Carp2 on MMU11 and Feml3 on MMU17 ) were identified , along with 12 additional QTL ( Q1Ucd1 on MMU1 ( which only reached a suggestive level of statistical significance ) , Wg1 , Carp1 , Cara1 and Feml1 on MMU2 , Carfhg1 on MMU5 , Wg3 on MMU8 , Feml2 on MMU9 , Wg4 and Cara2 on MMU11 and Carp3 and Cara3 on MMU17 ) whose expression was independent of the hg locus .
label: O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: In the current study we have developed speed congenic strains to isolate all the aforementioned QTL .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Single strains on an HG background were created for each chromosomal region outside of MMU2 , while a comprehensive panel of overlapping strains with identical donor regions on both B6 and HG backgrounds were developed for MMU2 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The MMU2 panel was developed to confirm the presence of multiple QTL and test for QTL - hg interactions .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Additionally , based on the knowledge of potential QTL - hg interactions , genes involved in Gh signaling , whose genomic location overlapped hg modifier QTL on MMU2 , 9 , 11 and 17 , were sequenced .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP O O O B-SO I-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: Speed congenic strain development
label: O O O O

text_a: Two speed congenic panels were created , the first comprehensively dissected MMU2 while the second isolated QTL on MMU1 , 5 , 8 , 9 , 11 and 17 ( Table 1 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The MMU2 panel consisted of eight congenic strains developed by introgressing four overlapping donor regions onto both B6 and HG genetic backgrounds ( Table 1 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Single donor regions bred onto an HG background were created to isolate the remaining QTL on MMU1 , 5 , 8 , 9 , 11 and 17 .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Implementation of a speed congenic approach using marker - assisted breeding with 79 genome - wide microsatellite markers accelerated production of all strains [ 5 , 6 ] ( Additional File 1 and Figure 1 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the current study , approximately 20 % of the CAST genome harboring all previously detected growth and carcass composition QTL was isolated on an HG or B6 background through the development of 14 speed congenic strains .

text_a: In this case differences between the congenic and control strains would be due in part or whole to these contaminating alleles .

text_a: We took several precautions to reduce the probability of this occurrence .

text_a: Using this information we increased the density of markers in each QTL region ( MMU1 , 2 , 5 , 8 , 9 , 11 and 17 ; Table 1 and Additional File 1 ) , ensuring the absence of CAST alleles at each of these QTL .

text_a: All black N2 males from the first two crosses described above were genotyped for 12 markers ( D1Mit432 , - 480 , D5Mit353 , - 311 , D9Mit60 , - 262 , D11Mit5 , - 67 , D8Mit234 , - 211 and D17Mit28 and - 142 ) , two spanning each of the six QTL harboring regions ( MMU1 , 5 , 8 , 9 , 11 and 17 ; Table 1 and Additional File 1 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Markers were selected to capture , at a minimum , the 2 - LOD support interval .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Two N2 males were selected to propagate the N3 generation ; one heterozygous for QTL on MMU1 and 9 and the other heterozygous for QTL on MMU5 , 8 , 11 and 17 ( Figure 1 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Both males were homozygous for HG alleles at all other known QTL .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO B-SO O

text_a: These males were backcrossed to HG females and two of the resulting N3 males inheriting the same sets of QTL as their sire were selected for breeding .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: These males were subsequently backcrossed to HG females and three N4 males were identified heterozygous for the following regions : 1 ) MMU1 and 9 ; 2 ) MMU5 and 11 ; 3 ) MMU8 , 11 and 17 ( Figure 1 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Starting at N4 and continuing through N6 , the best male with the lowest percent of unwanted donor alleles was selected after performing a genome scan using the remaining 67 genome - wide markers ( 79 total markers minus the 12 markers genotyped in the first two backcrosses spanning the know QTL intervals ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO I-SO O O

text_a: At N5 a distinct strain was created for each of the six individual donor regions and heterozygous mice were intermated ( Figure 1 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: Homozygous HG . CAST speed congenic strains were maintained through brother - sister mating .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Once each congenic was stabilized , 19 additional microsatellite markers were used to refine the position of each congenic recombinant end point ( Additional File 2 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Development of B6 . CASTC and HG . CASTC control strains
label: O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: HG is a strain in which the hg deletion has been introgressed onto a B6 background , therefore the only genetic differences between the strains would be the hg locus , tightly linked alleles from the outbred strain on which hg arose and contaminating alleles remaining after the nine backcrosses and fixed during inbreeding .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Instead of using parental B6 and HG strains as controls for phenotypic comparisons with each speed congenic , we choose to develop independent control strains originating from the same cross as the congenic panels .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Separate B6 . CAST control ( B6C ) and HG . CAST control ( HGC ) strains were developed using mice from the MMU2 experiment .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: Mice from the last backcross inheriting only B6 or HG MMU2 alleles at markers spanning MMU2 were intermated to serve as the basis for each control .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Both control strains were subsequently maintained through brother - sister mating .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The control strains were coisogenic with the parental B6 or HG strain with the exception of mutations that arose during congenic construction and a small percentage of contaminating donor alleles missed after 6 backcrosses .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Therefore , since the congenics and controls were developed through the same selection scheme and possibly share common contaminating regions , the B6C and HGC strains are the most ideal control to compare each congenic .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Phenotypic characterization
label: O O

text_a: Trait data were collected on approximately 40 mice ( 20 of each sex ) from each congenic and control strain .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To eliminate parity and reduce litter size effects only progeny from uniparous dams were characterized and all litters were standardized to 5 - 7 pups / litter .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mice were weaned at 3 weeks of age .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: Feed ( Purina 5008 ; 23 . 5 % protein , 6 . 5 % fat , 3 . 3 Kcal / g ) and water were offered ad libitum .
label: B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: Mice were weighed to the nearest 0 . 1 g at 2WK , 3WK , 6WK , and 9WK of age .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: At 9WK ( +/- 5 days ) mice were anesthetized under isoflurane and nasal - anal length ( nan ) and nasal - tail ( NT ) were measured to the nearest mm .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Tail length was calculated as nan minus NT .
label: O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Anesthetized mice were then sacrificed by decapitation and exsanguinated .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: Femoral fat pad ( FFP ) , gonadal fat pad ( GFP ) , mesenteric fat pad ( MFP ) and retroperitoneal fat pad ( RFP ) were removed and weighed to the nearest mg .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Chemical compositional analysis was performed for HGC , HG11 and HG17 carcasses as previously described with slight modifications [ 24 ] .
label: B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Briefly , after weighing each fat pad was returned to the carcass .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The entire gastrointestinal ( GI ) tract was subsequently removed and carcasses were again weighed .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This represented the empty carcass weight ( ECW ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Carcasses were labeled and secured in two layers of cheesecloth ( Fisher ) and frozen at - 20 degrees C until analysis .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: At this time , carcasses were freeze - dried for seven days and water content was determined by subtracting the freeze - dried weight from ECW .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: FAT was then extracted with ether for 7 days , followed by acetone for an additional 7 days in a Soxhlet apparatus .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Carcass ash ( ASH ) was determined measuring the remains after a 16 hour incineration at 575 degrees C .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Carcass protein ( PROT ) was calculated as the remaining portion after carcass fat ( FAT ) and ASH were subtracted from ECW .
label: O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Statistical analysis
label: O O

text_a: The MEANS and UNIVARIATE procedures of SAS were used to generate descriptive statistics and test normality assumptions for each trait [ 55 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: All data were then analyzed using the GLM procedure of SAS [ 55 ] with a linear model that included the fixed effects of strain , sex and strain by sex interaction ; dam ' s weight at breeding by strain was used as a covariate .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A second linear model was used to test for strain by hg genotype ( + / + or hg / hg ) interactions .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: This model included the fixed effects of donor region , sex and HG genotype and all possible two and three - way interactions .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Choosing a nominal P value of 0 . 05 and applying the Bonferroni correction for multiple comparisons established significant differences in the ANOVA ' s .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The critical P values used are indicated in each table .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Identification of candidate genes
label: O O O B-SO

text_a: Genes were identified by manual data mining of primary literature , reviews and book chapters .
label: B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To organize and collate genomic and functional information for each gene we created a custom Gh signaling Gene Map Annotator and Pathway Profiler ( GenMAPP ) pathway [ 56 ] ( Figure 5 ) .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Visualization and color - coding of genes using GenMAPP aided the selection of candidate genes mapping within QTL regions on MMU2 , 9 , 11 and 17 .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Candidate gene sequencing
label: O B-SO O

text_a: PCR amplicons covering the coding sequence and partial 5 ' and 3 ' untranslated regions for each selected candidate gene were amplified , purified and sequenced from the CAST strain using protocols outlined in [ 57 ] with slight modifications .
label: O O O O B-SO I-SO O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Total RNA from brain , liver , spleen , lung and testis was isolated from an adult CAST male mouse using Trizol ( Ambion ) .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: cDNA was produced from total RNA using standard procedures .
label: B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: PCR primer sets for each gene were designed using Primer3 [ 58 ] ( Additional File 5 ) .
label: O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The initial amplification was performed in 10 mu l PCR reactions using the Invitrogen Platinum TaqPCRx amplification system ( Invitrogen ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The reactions contained 1X PCR buffer , 1X Enhancer solution , 1 . 5 mM MgSO4 , 0 . 17 mM dNTPs , 1 mu M each primer , 0 . 1 unit of Platinum Taq ( Invitrogen ) and approximately 25 ng of cDNA .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Reactions were incubated for 5 min at 95 degrees C , then cycled for 45 s at 95 degrees C , 45 s at 55 degrees C , 1 min at 72 degrees C for 35 cycles with a final 72 degrees C extension for 10 min on a MJ Research PTC - 200 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The products were visualized on 1 . 5 % agarose gels containing 0 . 06 mu g / ml EtBr .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Bands of the correct size were excised and incubated in 100 mu l of sterile H2O at 80 degrees C for 10 min to elute DNA .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Reamplification reactions consisted of 1X PCR buffer , 1 . 5 mM MgCl2 , 0 . 17 mM dNTPs , 1 mu M each primer , 0 . 1 unit of Taq ( Promega ) and 10 mu l of eluate in a total volume of 50 mu l .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The same cycling parameters were used for reamplification reactions .
label: O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Products were visualized on 1 % 0 . 5X TBE agarose gels containing 0 . 06 mu g / ml EtBr , excised and purfied using PCR purification columns ( Promega ) .
label: B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To quantity each fragment 1 mu l of each purified product was run on a 1 . 0 % agarose gel containing 0 . 06 mu g / ml EtBr , along with a DNA mass ladder ( Invitrogen ) .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: In a 96 well plate , 15 ng of each PCR product was added to 5 pM of primer for sequencing .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: The College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences ( CAES ) Genomics Facility at the University of California , Davis , performed bidirectional sequencing of each amplicon .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Sequence analysis
label: B-SO O

text_a: B6 mRNA sequences for each gene were downloaded from the May 2004 ( mm5 ) UCSC ( NCBI Build 33 ) genome assembly [ 28 ] .
label: O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O

text_a: These sequences were imported along with all CAST sequence traces into the SeqMan sequence assembly program ( DNASTAR ) and manually curated for quality .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Poor quality reads were resequenced .
label: O O O O O O

text_a: Individual contigs were created for each gene and polymorphisms were detected and curated by manual inspection .
label: O B-SO O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O
