text_a: Fgf9 and Wnt4 Act as Antagonistic Signals to Regulate Mammalian Sex Determination
label: B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: The genes encoding members of the wingless - related MMTV integration site ( WNT ) and fibroblast growth factor ( FGF ) families coordinate growth , morphogenesis , and differentiation in many fields of cells during development .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO I-SO O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O

text_a: In the mouse , Fgf9 and Wnt4 are expressed in gonads of both sexes prior to sex determination .
label: O O B-Taxon O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Loss of Fgf9 leads to XY sex reversal , whereas loss of Wnt4 results in partial testis development in XX gonads .
label: O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , the relationship between these signals and the male sex - determining gene , Sry , was unknown .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: We show through gain - and loss - of - function experiments that fibroblast growth factor 9 ( FGF9 ) and WNT4 act as opposing signals to regulate sex determination .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the mouse XY gonad , Sry normally initiates a feed - forward loop between Sox9 and Fgf9 , which up - regulates Fgf9 and represses Wnt4 to establish the testis pathway .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Surprisingly , loss of Wnt4 in XX gonads is sufficient to up - regulate Fgf9 and Sox9 in the absence of Sry .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: These data suggest that the fate of the gonad is controlled by antagonism between Fgf9 and Wnt4 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: The role of the male sex - determining switch -- Sry in the case of mammals -- is to tip the balance between these underlying patterning signals .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In principle , sex determination in other vertebrates may operate through any switch that introduces an imbalance between these two signaling pathways .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: The development of sexually dimorphic reproductive organs is a common feature among animal species .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: The testis and ovary represent two divergent pathways of development from the bipotential embryonic gonad .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The switch that initiates divergent development of the gonad is highly diverse among species ; however , the underlying mechanisms that lead to the establishment of ovary or testis pathways are likely to be conserved .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In all species , the embryonic gonad is made up of a mixed population of germ cells and somatic cells .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O B-CL O

text_a: This tissue is remarkable in that all of its cells are believed to be bipotential , and can differentiate into ovarian or testicular lineages [ 1 , 2 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Consistent with the idea that cells in this primordium are poised between two developmental pathways , some of the genes that are involved in establishing sexual dimorphism , including Dax1 ( dosage - sensitive sex reversal - congenital adrenal hypoplasia critical region on the X chromosome protein 1 ) , Sox9 ( Sry - like HMG box 9 ) , Fgf9 ( fibroblast growth factor 9 ) , and Wnt4 ( wingless - related MMTV integration site 4 ) , are initially expressed in similar patterns in XX and XY gonads [ 3 - 8 ] .
label: O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The conventional view of mammalian sex determination is that the basic pathway of organ development is ovarian , and that the testis - determining gene operates by diverting this program toward testis development by simultaneously influencing the fate of the key supporting cell lineage and initiating a male - specific morphogenetic program .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: All of the experimental evidence suggests that these two processes are closely interwoven .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For example , both proliferation [ 9 ] and migration of cells to trigger testis cord formation [ 10 , 11 ] appear to be closely integrated with Sertoli cell differentiation .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O

text_a: Sry , a Y chromosome - linked gene , is the primary sex - determining gene in mammals [ 12 - 14 ] .
label: B-GGP O O B-GO I-GO O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: In the absence of Sry expression -- in XX embryos , or in XY embryos carrying a deletion of Sry -- cells in the gonad follow an ovarian differentiation pathway .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O B-CL O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Genetic evidence from chimeric mice [ 15 ] , and expression studies using reporter transgenes [ 2 , 16 ] , indicate that Sry expression is required only in precursors of the somatic supporting cell lineage .
label: B-SO O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O

text_a: Expression of Sry in these bipotential cells leads to their differentiation as testis - specific Sertoli cells rather than as follicle cells , the parallel cell type of the ovary [ 2 ] .
label: O O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is believed that the Sertoli cell is the first cell type to differentiate in the gonad [ 17 ] .
label: O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: There is substantial evidence that a critical threshold number of Sertoli cells is required to establish testis differentiation [ 9 , 15 , 18 - 20 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In cases where this threshold is not reached , ovary differentiation ensues .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Once Sry expression begins , expression patterns of other genes in the gonad begin to diverge .
label: O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: The first gene downstream of Sry known to show male - specific up - regulation in Sertoli cell precursors is a related gene expressed in many tissues in the developing embryo , Sox9 .
label: O O B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: Disruption of Sox9 expression in the XY gonad causes male - to - female sex reversal [ 21 , 22 ] , whereas increasing the dose of Sox9 in the XX gonad leads to testis development [ 23 - 25 ] .
label: O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These studies indicate that Sox9 plays a central role in sex determination .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O

text_a: Unlike Sry , which is specific to mammals , expression of Sox9 is known to be conserved in the gonad of many species .
label: O B-GGP O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In mammals , Sox9 is up - regulated immediately after Sry expression initiates .
label: O B-Taxon O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O O O

text_a: Experiments tracing Sry - expressing cells using a stable reporter demonstrated that once testis differentiation is established , all Sertoli cells that express Sox9 are descendants of cells that have expressed Sry [ 16 ] , suggesting that activation of Sox9 is a cell - autonomous effect of Sry .
label: O O B-GGP O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-CL O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: However , mutations in several signaling pathways including Fgf9 and Igf1r / Irr / Ir ( insulin - like growth factor 1 receptor / insulin receptor - related receptor / insulin receptor ) resulted in loss of Sox9 expression and partial or complete sex reversal [ 26 , 27 ] , suggesting that extracellular signaling pathways play a significant role during primary sex determination .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mice homozygous for a nan mutation in Fgf9 display male - to - female sex reversal caused by disruption of all testis - specific cellular events , including cell proliferation , mesonephric cell migration , testis cord formation , and the differentiation of Sertoli cells [ 26 , 27 ] .
label: B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O B-CL O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Fgf9 , like many of the founding signals in the gonads , is initially expressed in gonads of both sexes , but becomes male - specific after Sry is expressed .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O

text_a: In a reciprocal manner , expression of Wnt4 , which is also initially common to gonads of both sexes , becomes female - specific [ 8 ] .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: XX gonads with a nan mutation in Wnt4 display some obvious aspects of testicular differentiation [ 28 ] .
label: O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Based on the theory that Sertoli cells initiate all downstream testicular differentiation , this might imply that Sertoli differentiation had been initiated in Wnt4 - / - XX gonads .
label: O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: However , expression of Sertoli cell markers was not previously detected in these mutants during fetal stages [ 8 , 29 ] , leading to the conclusion that Wnt4 was not involved in primary sex determination in the gonad .
label: O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To integrate these findings , we investigated the genetic relationship of Sry , Sox9 , Fgf9 , and Wnt4 in the regulatory network that governs the gonadal field .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We show that the loss of Fgf9 in homozygous mutant XY gonads does not affect the expression of SRY or the initial up - regulation of SOX9 ; however , SOX9 expression is not maintained in the Fgf9 - / - mutant gonads , and testis differentiation is aborted .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: We also demonstrate that FGF9 represses the ovary - promoting gene , Wnt4 .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O

text_a: We hypothesize that FGF9 functions in a feed - forward loop to expand Sertoli precursor cells , which secrete FGF9 , to a critical threshold number sufficient to suppress Wnt4 .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: This directly or indirectly stabilizes SOX9 expression and secures the male fate of the gonad .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: WNT4 seems to oppose the male pathway by repressing expression of SOX9 and FGF9 .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: Surprisingly , both male pathway genes are transiently activated in Wnt4 - / - XX gonads in the absence of the Y - linked gene Sry .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-SO B-GGP O

text_a: Based on this genetic and in vitro data , we suggest that the plasticity of the bipotential gonad is controlled by mutually antagonistic signals between FGF9 and WNT4 in the gonadal field .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O

text_a: These signals coordinate sexually dimorphic patterns of growth , morphogenesis , and cellular differentiation .

text_a: RMCE - ASAP : a gene targeting method for ES and somatic cells to accelerate phenotype analyses
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: In recent years , tremendous insight has been gained on p53 regulation by targeting mutations at the p53 locus using homologous recombination in ES cells to generate mutant mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O B-CL O O B-SO B-Taxon O

text_a: Although informative , this approach is inefficient , slow and expensive .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To facilitate targeting at the p53 locus , we developed an improved Recombinase - Mediated Cassette Exchange ( RMCE ) method .
label: O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Our approach enables efficient targeting in ES cells to facilitate the production of mutant mice .
label: O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O

text_a: But more importantly , the approach was Adapted for targeting in Somatic cells to Accelerate Phenotyping ( RMCE - ASAP ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We provide proof - of - concept for this at the p53 locus , by showing efficient targeting in fibroblasts , and rapid phenotypic read - out of a recessive mutation after a single exchange .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: RMCE - ASAP combines inverted heterologous recombinase target sites , a positive / negative selection marker that preserves the germline capacity of ES cells , and the power of mouse genetics .
label: O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: These general principles should make RMCE - ASAP applicable to any locus .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: INTRODUCTION
label: O

text_a: p53 is one of the most highly analyzed proteins for the past 25 years .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: Studies in cultured cells , often relying on the transfection of plasmids expressing various p53 mutants , have established models to explain how p53 is regulated .
label: O O O B-CL O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O

text_a: In recent years , some of these models were tested in vivo by targeting subtle mutations at the p53 locus using homologous recombination in embryonic stem ( ES ) cells to generate mutant mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O B-SO B-Taxon O

text_a: The strength of this approach is that mutations are tested in a genomic setting and expressed from the endogenous promoter , ensuring physiological expression levels and correct spatio - temporal profiles .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: As significant differences between phenotypes from targeted p53 mutants in vivo and transfection data were observed [ e . g . Refs ( 1 - 5 ) ] , more targeted mutations need to be generated and analyzed in multiple tissues to formulate more accurate models of p53 regulation .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O

text_a: However , using homologous recombination in ES cells to generate mutant mice is an inefficient , slow and expensive method because ( i ) homologous recombination typically occurs at low frequency in ES cells , requiring sophisticated selection schemes and screening of hundreds of clones to identify the desired mutant ; ( ii ) large ( 15 - 20 kb ) plasmids , often difficult to clone , are required to increase targeting efficiency and ( iii ) breeding mice to homozygosity and housing a mouse colony generate further delays and costs .
label: O O O O O O O B-CL O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: Such limitations make the repeated targeting of a locus a technically daunting and economically impractical task .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: Improvements in current technologies are needed to enable such analyses to be applied to the p53 or other genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O

text_a: Developing methods to increase targeting efficiency in ES cells is clearly an important goal .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: In addition , efficient methods for gene targeting in fibroblasts could expedite phenotypic analyses .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: Indeed , siRNAs in fibroblasts often provide a faster read - out than equivalent gene knock - outs in animals ( 6 ) .
label: O O B-SO O B-CL O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: However , modeling most disease - associated mutations requires generating subtle mutations , not knock - outs or reduced expression alleles .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Targeting point mutations in fibroblasts by homologous recombination is extremely inefficient , and targeting both alleles is required to reveal the phenotype of recessive autosomal mutations .
label: O B-SO I-SO O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-GO B-SO O

text_a: Here we report an approach that enables highly efficient targeting at the p53 locus in both ES cells and fibroblasts .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O B-CL O B-CL O

text_a: Recombinase - Mediated Cassette Exchange ( RMCE ) approaches were developed to improve targeting efficiency using a two - step process : the gene of interest is first replaced by a selection cassette flanked by recombinase target sites ( e . g . loxP sites for Cre recombinase , to create a ' floxed ' locus ) .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O

text_a: Then , Cre - mediated recombination in the presence of a cassette containing a floxed mutant allele removes the resident sequence and inserts the mutant gene ( 7 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO B-SO B-SO B-SO O O B-SO O B-SO O B-SO B-SO O O O O

text_a: Previously , technical difficulties have prevented RMCE from being applied routinely to generate mutant mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O

text_a: For example , exchanges using cassettes with directly repeated loxP sites were inefficient because excisions dominated the intended exchanges ( 8 ) .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: loxP sites with different sequences were generated to overcome this problem , but these sites also underwent intramolecular recombination , making RMCE efficient only if the replacement cassette contained a marker enabling selection of the desired recombinant ( 7 , 9 - 12 ) .
label: B-SO I-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , interference resulting from expression of the selection marker and the endogenous gene ( 13 ) necessitates strategies to remove the selectable gene .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O

text_a: Together , previous studies indicate that an optimal RMCE requires ( i ) inverted heterologous loxP sites diverging by at least 2 nt to maximize the efficiency of exchange and ( ii ) an expression cassette enabling both positive selection to identify the initial recombinant and then negative selection to obtain a ' marker - free ' mutant allele ( 14 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O

text_a: Most RMCE experiments have been performed at random sites in somatic cell lines .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-CL O O

text_a: Only a few mutant mice generated by RMCE in ES cells have been reported , but the RMCE systematically introduced a selectable marker ( 15 - 17 ) , or , when tested without an incoming marker , proved inefficient ( 12 ) .
label: O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A recent report disclosed an additional problem : the Hygromycin - Thymidine Kinase fusion gene used most frequently for positive / negative selection in RMCE , leads to mouse sterility , so that exchanges can only be performed in ES cells ( 16 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: The RMCE strategy presented here relies on the integrated use of inverted heterologous loxP sites , a positive / negative selection marker that preserves the germline capacity of ES cells , and the power of mouse genetics to expedite phenotypic analyses .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: We show that our approach enables efficient targeting of marker - free mutations at the p53 locus in ES cells to generate mutant mice , but more importantly , it is Adapted for targeting in Somatic cells to Accelerate Phenotyping ( ASAP ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O O B-CL O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: Because it relies on very general principles , RMCE - ASAP could be applied to any locus of interest .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: The Ran - binding protein 2 ( RanBP2 ) is a large multimodular and pleiotropic protein .

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: Our findings support that RanBP2 plays a determinant role in modulating glucose and energy homeostasis .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: The data support that Cox1 and HKI are novel partners in vivo for the large LD of RanBP2 ( Figures 1 and 2 ) .
label: O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: The LD of RanBP2 exhibits chaperone activity toward folding intermediates of Cox11 , and possibly , the mature HKI ( Figure 1 ) .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O

text_a: Cox11 inhibits noncompetitively the activity of HKI with ~ 2 - 3 molecules of Cox11 ( assuming formation of Cox11 dimer ) required to inhibit completely the activity of a molecule of HKI ( Figure 2A and 2B ) .
label: B-GGP O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: Cox11 sequesters HKI by binding to HKI at a site that is distinct from the active site and effectively reduces the availability of [ HKI ] tot for catalysis .
label: B-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O

text_a: This is reflected by a reduction of the Vmax of HKI without significantly affecting the Km of the active site of HKI toward glucose ( Figure 2A and 2B ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O B-GGP O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: The inhibitory property of Cox11 over HKI is suppressed by RanBP2 ( Figure 2C ) , which by itself has a weak but significant inhibitory activity over HKI ( Figure 2D ) .
label: O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O

text_a: The sub - stochiometry effect of the LD of RanBP2 over the inhibition of HKI by Cox11 supports that a LD - dependent chaperonin - like mechanism underlies the suppression of Cox11 - dependent inhibition of HKI by RanBP2 , and that RanBP2 acts as a molecular buffer over HK1 and Cox11 activities .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O

label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-CL I-CL O

text_a: This possibly underlies the mistargeting of HKI to the myoid compartment of these neurons ( Figure S2 ) .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: The data support that the ultimate pathophysiological outcome in HKI , caused by a reduction in RanBP2 levels and its chaperone activity , is the selective degradation of HKI as reflected by the reduced levels of HKI ( and ATP ) but not of other mitochondrial and NPC components ( Figure 5 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GO O B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Through this process , it is also possible that deficits in RanBP2 cause a disturbance in the equilibrium between Cox11 , HK1 , and RanBP2 by leading to an increase of the inhibitory activity of Cox11 over HKI that promotes the uncoupling of the interaction of HKI from RanBP2 , ultimately causing HKI degradation .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O

text_a: Regardless , lower levels of HKI likely contribute to the decreased levels in ATP , slower growth rates , and diminished ability to metabolize glucose of RanBP2 + / - mice ( Figures 5 - 7 ) .

text_a: As discussed subsequently , the ATP deficits in the retina likely account for the reduced electrophysiological responses of retinal neurons ( Figure 8 ) .

text_a: Defective ALK5 signaling in the neural crest leads to increased postmigratory neural crest cell apoptosis and severe outflow tract defects
label: O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Congenital cardiovascular diseases are the most common form of birth defects in humans .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: A substantial portion of these defects has been associated with inappropriate induction , migration , differentiation and patterning of pluripotent cardiac neural crest stem cells .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O

text_a: While TGF - beta - superfamily signaling has been strongly implicated in neural crest cell development , the detailed molecular signaling mechanisms in vivo are still poorly understood .
label: O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: We deleted the TGF - beta type I receptor Alk5 specifically in the mouse neural crest cell lineage .
label: O B-SO O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-GGP O O O B-Taxon B-CL I-CL I-CL O O

text_a: Failure in signaling via ALK5 leads to severe cardiovascular and pharyngeal defects , including inappropriate remodeling of pharyngeal arch arteries , abnormal aortic sac development , failure in pharyngeal organ migration and persistent truncus arteriosus .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: While ALK5 is not required for neural crest cell migration , our results demonstrate that it plays an important role in the survival of post - migratory cardiac neural crest cells .
label: O B-GGP O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: Our results demonstrate that ALK5 - mediated signaling in neural crest cells plays an essential cell - autonomous role in the pharyngeal and cardiac outflow tract development .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: A considerable percentage of cardiac birth defects is caused by a failure in normal migration , differentiation or patterning of the cardiac neural crest ( CNC ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This subset of pluripotent neural crest stem cells forms in the dorsal aspect of the neural tube at the level of the mid - otic placode to the third somite [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Subsequently cardiac neural crest cells ( CNCCs ) delaminate , undergo a phenotypic transformation from an epithelial to mesenchymal cell type , and migrate latero - ventrally into the 3rd , 4th and 6th pharyngeal arch arteries ( PAAs ) , where they contribute to the formation of the smooth muscle cell layer of endothelial structures derived from the aortic arch arteries [ 1 - 3 ] .
label: O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A subset of CNCCs continues to migrate deeper into the aortic sac to form the aortico - pulmonary septum ; a vital structure , which separates the pulmonary trunk from the aorta [ 4 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: An indispensable role of CNCCs in the development of the cardiac outflow tract was originally demonstrated by pioneering studies of Kirby and coworkers [ 1 ] , who showed that ablation of the CNC in the chick led to severe outflow tract ( OFT ) defects including persistent truncus arteriosus ( PTA ) , mispatterning of the great vessels and outflow tract mal - alignments [ 5 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Early migratory CNCCs have been shown to retain a considerable degree of plasticity and their fate is largely controlled by instructional signals from local environments into which NCCs migrate [ 6 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: Several recent studies have indicated that members of the TGF - beta superfamily , i . e . , TGF - beta s and BMPs are likely candidates to provide some of these signals .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mice deficient in TGF - beta 2 display fourth aortic arch artery defects [ 7 ] , while neural crest cell specific abrogation of TGF - beta type II receptor ( Tgfbr2 ) results in interruption of the aortic arch and PTA [ 8 , 9 ] .
label: B-Taxon O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: BMPs 6 and - 7 are required for proper formation of the outflow tract cushions [ 10 ] , while BMP type II receptor is needed for proper development of the conotruncal ridges [ 11 ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Moreover , neural crest - specific deletion of the BMP type I receptors Alk2 and Alk3 has been shown to lead to defective aortico - pulmonary septation , among other cardiac defects [ 12 , 13 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: TGF - beta subfamily ligands signal via a receptor complex composed of two type II receptors and two type I receptors [ 14 , 15 ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Ligand binding leads to phosphorylation and activation of type I receptors , which , in turn , phosphorylate and activate a specific set of downstream signaling molecules called Smads .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP O

text_a: In general terms , TGF - beta s bind to the TGF - beta type II receptor ( TGF beta RII ) and TGF - beta type I receptor ( ALK5 ) activating TGF - beta Smads ( 2 and 3 ) , while BMPs bind to the BMP type II receptor and type I receptors ALK2 , - 3 , or 6 , activating BMP Smads ( 1 , 5 and 8 ) .
label: O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O

text_a: However , it is likely that these signaling interactions are more complex in vivo , possibly allowing formation of heterotetrameric complexes composed of different type II and type I receptors [ 16 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O

text_a: In addition , recent studies have identified novel TGF - beta - related ligands , which can bind to entire different combinations of receptors .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For instance , growth and differentiation factors ( GDFs ) 8 and 9 can bind to Activin type II receptor and ALK5 to activate TGF - beta Smads [ 17 , 18 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Therefore , we hypothesized that deletion of Alk5 in a specific cell lineage should reveal phenotypes which cannot be seen in comparable mutants lacking Tgfbr2 .
label: O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O

text_a: Indeed , we recently showed that neural crest cell specific Alk5 mutants display a unique spectrum of craniofacial developmental defects , e . g . , cleft snout and severe mandibular hypoplasia [ 19 ] ; these phenotypes were not seen in corresponding Tgfbr2 mutants [ 20 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O

text_a: To determine , whether ALK5 would also mediate unique non - redundant signaling events in cardiac neural crest cells , we focused on cardiac and pharyngeal phenotypes of mouse embryos lacking Alk5 specifically in neural crest cells .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-GGP O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O

text_a: We discovered that in Alk5 / Wnt1 - Cre mutants , pharyngeal organs ( thymus and parathyroid ) fail to migrate appropriately .
label: O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Moreover , the mutant embryos display severe aortic sac and pharyngeal arch artery defects , and failed aortico - pulmonary septation leading to PTA .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Our data further suggest that at least some of these abnormal detected phenotypes result from a dramatic increase in apoptosis of postmigratory cardiac neural crest cells .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O

text_a: These phenotypes differ remarkably from those seen in corresponding Tgfbr2 mutants , suggesting that ALK5 mediates a wider spectrum of signaling events than its classical binding partner TGF beta RII in cardiac neural crest cells during cardiac and pharyngeal development .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: Persistent truncus arteriosus and abnormal large vessels in mice lacking Alk5 in cardiac NCCs
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-GGP O O B-CL

text_a: To inactivate Alk5 in cardiac NCCs , mice homozygous for the floxed Alk5 allele ( Alk5Flox / Flox ) [ 21 ] were crossed with transgenic Wnt1 - Cre mice [ 22 ] , which were also heterozygous for the Alk5 knockout allele ( Alk5KO ) allele .
label: O O B-GGP O O B-CL O B-Taxon O O O B-SO B-GGP B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-SO O O O B-SO O

text_a: The resulting mice heterozygous for the Alk5Flox and Alk5KO alleles , which also carried the Wnt1 - Cre transgene , had the Alk5 gene specifically inactivated in NCCs ( herein termed Alk5 / Wnt1 - Cre ) , while the littermates with remaining allelic combinations were phenotypically normal and served as controls ( Alk5Flox / + , Alk5KO / + ; Wnt1 - Cre ) .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O B-CL O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: When embryos were harvested during the last day of gestation , an expected number ( 25 % ) of Alk5 / Wnt1 - Cre mutants were recovered .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O

text_a: However , all mutant offspring died either during the birth or during the first post - natal hours .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To determine , if ALK5 - mediated TGF - beta - signaling had a role in development of the OFT and large vessels of the aortic arch , we performed casting dye experiments on E17 embryos ( Fig . 1A - D ) .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In wild - type embryos ( Fig . 1A ) , the aorta was clearly separated from the pulmonary trunk , and the right brachiocephalic , left carotid and left subclavian arteries branched directly off the aortic arch .
label: O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In contrast , Alk5 / Wnt1Cre mutant embryos consistently displayed a single prominent arterial trunk ( Fig . 1C - D ) , while corresponding Tgfbr2 mutant embryos ( Fig . 1B ) displayed interrupted aortic arch , as reported earlier [ 8 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Approximately 40 % of the Alk5 mutants had a right - sided outflow tract , with the retroesophageal arch connecting to the descending aorta and to the left subclavian artery .
label: O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The carotid arteries originated either from a common bud located in the ventral side of the ascending arch , or from separate adjacent sites , as verified by serial sectioning ( Fig . 1M - P ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The remaining mutants displayed a left - sided aortic arch , where the right carotid arteries originated from the right lateral aspect of the ascending trunk , while the left carotid arteries budded from the ventral or right ventral aspects of the trunk ( Fig . 1I - L ) .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: During the last few years the Wnt1 - Cre transgenic driver line has proven to be a powerful tool for tissue - specific gene deletion in NCCs [ 12 , 13 , 27 , 28 ] .

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Bone morphogenetic protein ( BMP ) family members , including BMP2 , BMP4 , and BMP7 , are expressed throughout limb development .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: BMPs have been implicated in early limb patterning as well as in the process of skeletogenesis .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , due to complications associated with early embryonic lethality , particularly for Bmp2 and Bmp4 , and with functional redundancy among BMP molecules , it has been difficult to decipher the specific roles of these BMP molecules during different stages of limb development .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: To circumvent these issues , we have constructed a series of mouse strains lacking one or more of these BMPs , using conditional alleles in the case of Bmp2 and Bmp4 to remove them specifically from the limb bud mesenchyme .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Contrary to earlier suggestions , our results indicate that BMPs neither act as secondary signals downstream of Sonic Hedghog ( SHH ) in patterning the anteroposterior axis nor as signals from the interdigital mesenchyme in specifying digit identity .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We do find that a threshold level of BMP signaling is required for the onset of chondrogenesis , and hence some chondrogenic condensations fail to form in limbs deficient in both BMP2 and BMP4 .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: However , in the condensations that do form , subsequent chondrogenic differentiation proceeds normally even in the absence of BMP2 and BMP7 or BMP2 and BMP4 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: In contrast , we find that the loss of both BMP2 and BMP4 results in a severe impairment of osteogenesis .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O

text_a: Synopsis
label: O

text_a: A group of related signaling molecules called bone morphogenetic proteins ( BMPs ) are known to play important roles in the formation of the structures such as the limbs .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , because different members of this group often have similar effects on target cells and are produced in overlapping regions of the embryo and hence can be redundant with one another , removal of any single member of the BMP family may not reveal the full extent of the roles they play during development .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We have therefore improved on this type of analysis by removing pairs of these factors ( BMP2 and BMP4 or BMP2 and BMP7 ) specifically from the developing limb .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: Although some have speculated that these signals play an early role in organizing or patterning the different tissues of the limb , we find no evidence for such a role .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We do find , however , that a minimal amount of BMP signal is required to form cartilage , and hence some cartilaginous elements fail to form in limbs deficient in both BMP2 and BMP4 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

label: O O O O O B-CHEBI B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Briefly , sections were deparaffinized in xylene and rehydrated through a graded ethanol series .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: Sections were postfixed in 4 % paraformaldehyde in PBS at room temperature for 15 min , digested with 10 mu g / ml proteinase K at room temperature for 10 min , and again fixed in 4 % paraformaldehyde at room temperature for 10 min and acetylated in the solution containing 0 . 2 % hydrochloric acid , 0 . 1 M triethanol amine , and 0 . 25 % acetic anhydride at room temperature for 10 min .

label: O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: Hybridization was performed in a humidified chamber in a solution containing 50 % formamide , 10 % dextran sulfate , 1 x Denhardt ' s solution , 0 . 6 M sodium chloride , 0 . 01 M Tris buffer ( pH 7 . 5 ) , 0 . 001 M EDTA , 0 . 05 M dithiothreitol , 0 . 25 % SDS , 200 mu g tRNA , and 35S - labeled cRNA probe at the final concentration of 5 x 106 cpm / ml at 55 degrees C for 16 h .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Combining global genome and transcriptome approaches to identify the candidate genes of small - effect quantitative trait loci in collagen - induced arthritis
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-GGP O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Quantitative traits such as complex diseases are controlled by many small - effect genes that are difficult to identify .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Here we present a novel strategy to identify the candidate genes for small - effect quantitative trait loci ( QTL ) in collagen induced arthritis ( CIA ) using global genome and transcriptome approaches .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: First , we performed genome linkage analysis in F2 progeny of the CIA susceptible and resistant strains to search for small - effect QTL .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Second , we detected gene expression patterns of both strains during CIA .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: The candidate genes were identified using three criteria : they are located in a genomic region linked to CIA ; they are disease - specific differentially expressed during CIA ; and they are strain - specific differentially expressed regarding the two parental strains .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Eight small - effect QTL controlling CIA severity were identified .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Of 22 , 000 screened genes , 117 were both strain - specific and disease - specific differentially expressed during CIA .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Of these 117 genes , 21 were located inside the support intervals of the 8 small - effect QTL and thus were considered as candidate genes .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Susceptibility to most complex diseases is controlled by many genes , each having a small effect on the disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: One example is rheumatoid arthritis ( RA ) , a common complex multifactorial autoimmune disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Several studies have been carried out to detect the genetic basis of RA , and more than 30 genomic regions have shown evidence of linkage to the disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Most of these genomic regions did not reach a genome - wide significant threshold value of linkage , with P values between 0 . 05 and 0 . 001 [ 1 - 5 ] .
label: O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Thus , these loci only have a small effect on RA .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: Small genetic contributions could also be seen from the susceptibility genes of RA identified so far , including HLA - DR4 , PADI4 , PTPN22 and FCRL3 [ 6 - 9 ] .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Except for HLA - DR4 , which is strongly associated with RA , all the other susceptibility genes have only a small effect on the disease .
label: O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the mouse model of RA , small genetic contributions are also often observed .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: For example , in a previous study , we carried out a genome screen to identify the quantitative trait loci ( QTL ) in collagen - induced arthritis ( CIA ) , which is a widely used animal model of RA .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Only one QTL , Cia2 , was identified for the phenotype of CIA severity , but this QTL contributes to only 16 % of the phenotype variations for CIA susceptibility in F2 progeny [ 10 ] .
label: O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This suggests that there must be other susceptibility genes whose contributions were not big enough to reach the stringent significance threshold value of linkage analysis .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: One aim of using animal models for complex diseases is to detect the genetic basis of these diseases .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: With controllable environmental factors as well as the known genetic background , animal models are powerful tools to search for susceptibility genes for complex diseases , and have been intensively employed for that purpose .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: More than 27 , 000 QTL have been identified in the mouse genome since the first QTL was identified at the beginning of the 1990s [ 11 ] .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: By 2005 , approximately 20 quantitative trait genes ( QTGs ) in the mouse genome had been identified [ 12 , 13 ] .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Interestingly , most QTGs identified in animal models have the causal polymorphisms in the protein - coding region [ 14 ] , which provoke protein structure changes or protein deficiency .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: This suggests , on the one hand , that small - effect QTL are difficult to identify with traditional strategies and , on the other hand , that the polymorphisms regulating gene expression might only slightly affect the quantitative traits , and thus are more difficult to identify .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Microarray - based global gene expression is a powerful technique for investigating complex diseases .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: During disease development , genes involved in the disease are likely to be differentially regulated .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Therefore , signature genes of the diseases could be identified by detecting the expression patterns of the disease - related cells / tissues and their ideal controls .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: In the past decade , many studies applied this technique to study both RA and its animal models [ 15 - 22 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: Indeed , genes involved in arthritis show distinct expression patterns in certain tissues and pathological stages of the disease .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Genes involved in immunoinflammatory responses were differentially expressed in the blood cells in RA patients [ 18 ] .
label: B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: Chemokines and adhesion molecules were upregulated in the joint at the initiation phase of arthritis in animal models [ 21 , 22 ] , while genes involved in cartilage destruction and bone erosion were differentially expressed at the late phase of arthritis in animal models of RA [ 15 , 16 ] .

text_a: In this study , we attempted for the first time to identify small - effect QTL in an F2 progeny .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Small - effect QTL are defined as those reaching the threshold value of P = 0 . 05 but that did not reach the significant threshold value suggested by Lander and Botstein [ 26 ] .

text_a: Although not significant , there is evidence that most of the eight small - effect QTL likely contain susceptibility genes for CIA .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: First , we performed the linkage analysis in three datasets , including all 290 F progeny , 76 C5 + / + F2 progeny and 133 C5 + / - F2 progeny .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O B-SO O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Five of the eight small - effect QTL were identified in at least two datasets , suggesting that these QTL are reproducible .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: Second , many QTL identified in the present study overlap with arthritis QTL previously identified , including loci 1 , 2 , 5 and 6 .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: In addition , syntenic analysis revealed that the counterpart genomic regions on the human genome of many of these eight QTL are linked to RA .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: For five of the eight small - effect QTL the DBA / 1 alleles are the arthritis - enhancing alleles , while the FVBN alleles are the arthritis - enhancing alleles in the other three QTL , indicating that some susceptibility genes could come from the resistant strain .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Interestingly , loci 2 and 7 partially overlap with two arthritis - related QTL identified by us in the same F2 progeny [ 10 ] .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Locus 2 was located at the same genomic region as Cia27 , a QTL controlling IgG2a antibody levels to collagen II .
label: B-SO O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O B-GGP O O B-SO O O B-GO O O B-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: Recently , we have refined this QTL into a 4 . 1 Mb genomic region and showed that a gene within this region regulates CIA severity by controlling the IgG2a antibody levels to collagen II [ 31 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O

text_a: Locus 7 on chromosome 16 overlaps with Lp1 , which controls lymphocyte proliferation .
label: B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O B-GGP O O O B-CL O O

text_a: Furthermore , according to our unpublished data , loci 8 on chromosome 17 controls lymphocyte adherence during development of CIA .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Therefore , the gene within the small - effect QTL could affect CIA severity through controlling arthritis - related phenotypes .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Several studies have been carried out to detect gene expression during CIA , all of which used joints as the target tissue [ 15 , 16 , 21 , 22 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This study , for the first time , detected gene expression in LNs during CIA .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: We present an extensive study of gene expression patterns in LNs of both genetically susceptible and resistant strains at four different phases of CIA .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In both strains , differentially regulated genes were highly concentrated at the PI and CA phases , and only a small number of genes were differentially expressed in two or three phases .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This indicates that biological responses in LNs were stronger in the PI and CA phases than in the OA phase , and the responses at different phases were different .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: When comparing the susceptible to the resistant strain , the biggest difference was found in one cluster of genes ( cluster IV , Figure 2 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: These genes had a higher expression in DBA / 1 than in FVB / N at the early phases of CIA ( NC , PI and OA ) and the opposite expression pattern in the CA phase .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: GO term classification revealed that these genes were related to lymphocyte proliferation and activation , suggesting that lymphocytes in the DBA / 1 strain are more activated than those in the FVB / N strain .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-CL O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , this difference is not CIA specific because the expression difference between the two strains existed in mice without immunisation .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Additionally , some genes related to the immune response were upregulated in the DBA / 1 strain but not in the FVB / N strain during CIA .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These differences could explain why a higher antibody response to collagen II occurred in the DBA / 1 strain compared to the FVB / N strain , and might partially explain the difference of the susceptibility to CIA between both strains .
label: O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Twenty - one genes were identified as potential candidate genes for six of the eight small - effect QTL according to their gene expression patterns during CIA and their genomic locations .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O

text_a: No candidate genes were located in QTL 4 and 7 , suggesting that QTG polymorphisms of the susceptibility genes inside these two QTL might not affect the phenotype by regulating gene expression .
label: O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: Two of the 21 candidate genes were reported to be involved in arthritis .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mapk14 , a candidate gene for locus 8 and also called p38 mitogen - activated protein kinase ( MAPK ) alpha , regulates the production of arthritis - essential cytokines , such as tumour necrosis factor and interleukin - 1 [ 32 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O

text_a: Moreover , inhibitors of p38 MAPK could attenuate CIA in rats [ 33 ] , and p38 MAPK is becoming a potential therapeutic target in RA [ 32 ] .
label: O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Stat5a , a candidate gene for loci 6 , is an essential molecule for lymphoid development and differentiation [ 34 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Stat5a - deficient mice were reported to lose tolerance , resulting in the development of autoimmune diseases .
label: B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Stat5a is suggested to contribute to tolerance through maintenance of the CD4 + CD25 + regulatory T cell population [ 35 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O

text_a: Therefore , we have presented a strategy to identify small - effect QTL and search for potential candidate genes within them .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: However , it is noteworthy that the low statistical threshold and small number of animals per group could lead to some false positive results .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: On the genome level , some of the eight small - effect QTL identified using a very low threshold value ( P < 0 . 05 ) could be false positives .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For example , locus 4 was identified with a low P value and does not overlap with any previously identified arthritis QTL .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: On the transcriptome level , the small number of animals per group and the low threshold used to detect gene expression could also result in false positives in the differentially expressed genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Furthermore , the differential expression of a gene could result not only from allele difference between two strains , but also from other factors .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Therefore , our findings should be confirmed in future studies .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: We present a strategy to search candidate genes for small - effect QTL .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O

text_a: With this strategy , we identified 21 candidate genes for 8 small - effect QTL regulating CIA susceptibility .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Our future studies will be carried out using two approaches .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The first is generating congenic animals for promising small - effect QTL that have relatively high P values and overlap with previously - identified arthritis QTL .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: The second approach is investigating candidate genes using both mouse and human studies .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Candidate genes will be selected according to their function and polymorphism between the two strains .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Thereafter , we will generate knock - out mice to investigate the role of the genes in CIA .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: For the loci whose counterparts on the human genome are linked to RA , we will investigate the candidate genes using case - control association studies in RA cohorts .
label: O O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Pygo1 and Pygo2 roles in Wnt signaling in mammalian kidney development
label: B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The pygopus gene of Drosophila encodes an essential component of the Armadillo ( beta - catenin ) transcription factor complex of canonical Wnt signaling .
label: O B-GGP B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O O

text_a: To better understand the functions of Pygopus - mediated canonical Wnt signaling in kidney development , targeted mutations were made in the two mammalian orthologs , Pygo1 and Pygo2 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: Each mutation deleted > 80 % of the coding sequence , including the critical PHD domain , and almost certainly resulted in nan function .
label: O B-SO B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Pygo2 homozygous mutants , with rare exception , died shortly after birth , with a phenotype including lens agenesis , growth retardation , altered kidney development , and in some cases exencephaly and cleft palate .
label: B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Pygo1 homozygous mutants , however , were viable and fertile , with no detectable developmental defects .
label: B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Double Pygo1 / Pygo2 homozygous mutants showed no apparent synergy in phenotype severity .
label: O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: The BAT - gal transgene reporter of canonical Wnt signaling showed reduced levels of expression in Pygo1 - / - / Pygo2 - / - mutants , with tissue - specific variation in degree of diminution .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The Pygo1 and Pygo2 genes both showed widespread expression in the developing kidney , with raised levels in the stromal cell compartment .
label: O B-GGP O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O

text_a: Confocal analysis of the double mutant kidneys showed disturbance of both the ureteric bud and metanephric mesenchyme - derived compartments .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Branching morphogenesis of the ureteric bud was altered , with expanded tips and reduced tip density , probably contributing to the smaller size of the mutant kidney .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: In addition , there was an expansion of the zone of condensed mesenchyme capping the ureteric bud .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Nephron formation , however , proceeded normally .
label: O O O O O O O O

text_a: Microarray analysis showed changed expression of several genes , including Cxcl13 , Slc5a2 , Klk5 , Ren2 and Timeless , which represent candidate Wnt targets in kidney development .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: The mammalian Pygopus genes are required for normal branching morphogenesis of the ureteric bud during kidney development .
label: O B-Taxon O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Nevertheless , the relatively mild phenotype observed in the kidney , as well as other organ systems , indicates a striking evolutionary divergence of Pygopus function between mammals and Drosophila .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O

text_a: In mammals , the Pygo1 / Pygo2 genes are not absolutely required for canonical Wnt signaling in most developing systems , but rather function as quantitative transducers , or modulators , of Wnt signal intensity .
label: O B-Taxon O O B-GGP O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Wnt signaling is of critical importance in several stages of kidney development .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mutual inductive interactions between the ureteric bud and metanephric mesenchyme drive nephrogenesis [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The ureteric bud synthesizes Wnt9b , which is essential for induction of the mesenchyme to form nephrons [ 2 ] .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Wnt4 is made by the induced metanephric mesenchyme and is also required for nephrogenesis [ 3 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , Wnt11 , secreted by the ureteric bud tips , participates in a positive feedback loop promoting glial cell line - derived neurotrophic factor ( GDNF ) expression by the metanephric mesenchyme [ 4 ] .
label: O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mutations in Wnt9b or Wnt4 result in a dramatic block in nephron formation , while Wnt11 mutants show a significant reduction in nephron number .
label: B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is interesting to note that Wnt4 and Wnt11 have been shown to signal , at least in some cases , through noncanonical pathways [ 5 - 7 ] , while there is evidence indicating that Wnt9b activates canonical Wnt signaling in the kidney [ 2 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Genetic studies in Drosophila have identified the Pygopus ( Pygo ) gene as a critical component of canonical Wnt signaling [ 8 - 11 ] .
label: B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Pygo and Lgs interact with beta - catenin during the formation of the canonical transcriptional complex and are required for accumulation of beta - catenin in the nucleus [ 12 ] .
label: B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GO O O O O

text_a: Lgs binds the central armadillo repeats of beta - catenin , while Pygo interacts with Lgs , mediating activation of Wnt targets [ 9 , 13 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O B-SO O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: The N - terminal domain of Pygo is required for Wnt transcriptional activation , while the PHD motif is required for the association of Pygo with Lgs [ 9 , 13 ] .

text_a: Additionally , a putative nuclear localization signal ( NLS ) was identified within the N - terminal domain of Pygo , suggesting a possible role of nuclear importation of beta - catenin [ 8 , 11 ] .

text_a: Further , the Wnt11 mutants showed an altered feedback loop between Wnt signaling from the ureteric bud to the mesenchyme and GDNF signaling from the mesenchyme to the bud , whereas in the Pygo1 / Pygo2 mutants , we observed disrupted Wnt signaling in the ureteric bud .

text_a: The results in this report indicate a striking and surprising evolutionary divergence of Pygopus function between Drosophila and mammals .

text_a: In conclusion , the mammalian Pygo2 gene is required for normal branching morphogenesis of the ureteric bud , with mutants showing dilated tips and reduced numbers of tips .

text_a: In mammals , however , the phenotypic effects of Pygopus mutation are much milder than in Drosophila .

text_a: A Mammal - Specific Doublesex Homolog Associates with Male Sex Chromatin and Is Required for Male Meiosis

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Gametogenesis is a sexually dimorphic process requiring profound differences in germ cell differentiation between the sexes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O

text_a: In mammals , the presence of heteromorphic sex chromosomes in males creates additional sex - specific challenges , including incomplete X and Y pairing during meiotic prophase .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O B-GO O O O O O

text_a: This triggers formation of a heterochromatin domain , the XY body .
label: O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O B-GO I-GO O

text_a: The XY body disassembles after prophase , but specialized sex chromatin persists , with further modification , through meiosis .
label: O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Here , we investigate the function of DMRT7 , a mammal - specific protein related to the invertebrate sexual regulators Doublesex and MAB - 3 .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O
